data.jd_text:
**Job Title** 
 \- Head of Clinical Validation
 



**Location** 
 : Dubai, UAE.
 



  





**Summary:** 




 The Head of Clinical Validation leads the Hub and Spoke Model for clinical validation
 



 This executive role is responsible for building and managing a distributed network of clinical validators across multiple specialties, geographies, and healthcare settings, ensuring continuous quality improvement and evidence\-based care delivery.
 



  





**Core Responsibilities** 




 1\. Strategic Leadership
 


* Define and execute the clinical validation strategy aligned with organizational goals
* Establish the Hub and Spoke operational model for scalable validation
* Build relationships with medical associations, academic institutions, and regulatory bodies
* Report to executive leadership on clinical quality metrics and risk indicators
* Develop the 3\-year clinical validation roadmap
* Manage the clinical validation budget and resource allocation



 2\. Clinical Governance
 


* Chair the Clinical Validation Committee with representatives from all spokes
* Establish clinical validation standards, SOPs, and quality benchmarks
* Oversee harm level classification for all clinical content
* Ensure compliance with FHIR R4, ICD\-10, SNOMED CT, LOINC standards
* Manage clinical risk register and escalation protocols
* Lead root cause analysis for clinical validation failures
* Ensure HIPAA, GDPR, and UAE healthcare regulatory compliance
* Ensure compliance with all regulatory requirements for AI Enabled Healthcare Applications



 3\. Hub Operations
 


* Build and lead the central clinical validation team
* Develop validation workflows for journeys, states, triggers, and UI flows
* Co\-develop clinical validation workflows and tooling
* Establish KPIs and dashboards for validation throughput and quality
* Create and maintain the clinical evidence library with 100,000\+ citations (international, regional and UAE)
* Manage relationships with clinical knowledge partners



 4\. Spoke Network Management
 


* Recruit, train, and certify clinical validators across specialties
* Establish spoke validator credentialing and re\-certification programs
* Create specialty\-specific validation protocols
* Manage spoke performance and quality metrics
* Facilitate knowledge sharing across the spoke network
* Coordinate multi\-specialty reviews for complex journeys



 5\. Quality Assurance \& Continuous Improvement
 


* Implement clinical validation quality metrics and reporting
* Conduct regular audits of validated content
* Lead post\-market surveillance for clinical content
* Manage adverse event investigation and content remediation
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives based on clinical outcomes data
* Benchmark against industry best practices and academic standards.



  





**Preferred Qualifications:** 



* MD, MBBS, or equivalent medical degree, Master's degree in AI, Healthcare Quality, Clinical Informatics, or Health Administration
* Board certification in a clinical specialty
* 7\+ years of clinical practice experience, 3\+ years in clinical quality, validation, or governance roles, 5\+ years in leadership positions managing clinical teams
* Experience with digital health platforms or clinical decision support systems



  





**About PureHealth** 




 PureHealth is the UAE’s largest integrated healthcare platform, committed to revolutionizing the nation’s healthcare ecosystem and advancing the future of health through innovation, technology, and world\-class care delivery.
 



  





**Why Join Us** 




 At PureHealth, you’ll be part of a transformational journey to redefine healthcare through technology and human\-centered innovation. We empower our teams to create impact, challenge boundaries, and lead change. Working with us means contributing to a purpose\-driven mission—advancing the future of health—while growing your career in one of the UAE’s most dynamic, fast\-evolving organizations.

data.jd_text:
**About Us**
 At Sully.ai,
 **We’re Building the Most Impactful Healthcare Company on Earth**
 We believe that access to a great doctor is a basic human right. Today, that’s not a reality. Delays, misdiagnoses, administrative chaos, and burnout plague the system.
   

  

**Our Mission**
*One Human, One Doctor* 
 .
   

  

 We enable our customers to staff 30% of their workforce with AI by creating a shared agent architecture for scale and efficiency. All powered by our own patented, world\-class models and deployed in real\-world care.
   

  

**About The Role**
* We’re hiring a Head of Engineering to own and scale Sully.ai’s core product efforts in the UAE, with full responsibility for architecture, execution, reliability, and performance across region\-specific healthcare workflows, integrations, and regulatory requirements.


 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Own end\-to\-end engineering execution for your domain, from architecture and roadmap through delivery and reliability.
* Drive step\-function latency reductions, targeting at least 50 percent improvements across note generation and decision\-support workflows where applicable.
* Design and operate robust observability, metrics, and model\-selection systems to ensure consistent performance at scale.
* Lead domain\-specific execution rituals including daily and weekly standups, backlog ownership in Linear, and tight cross\-functional coordination.
* Translate product goals into clear dependencies, timelines, and deliverables to keep teams unblocked and shipping.
* Operationalize continuous quality evaluation pipelines to improve accuracy, completeness, and reliability of outputs.
* Set and enforce engineering best practices across your stack, including code quality, reviews, on\-call standards, and operational rigor.


 Hard Requirements
   

  

* Founder\-level ownership mindset. You operate like the business depends on your decisions and execution.
* Senior, hands\-on engineering ability. You actively design systems, write and review production code, and set the technical bar by example.
* Experience in high\-intensity environments such as YC\-backed startups, early\-stage companies, or zero\-to\-one teams where speed and judgment matter.
* Comfort with ambiguity. You turn incomplete product direction into clear technical plans and ship without heavy process.
* Bias toward leverage and simplicity. You choose durable solutions and know when to optimize versus when to ship.


**Nice\-to\-have**
* Experience with FHIR/HL7 or EHR systems.
* Background in real\-time or near\-real\-time streaming, diarization, or structured\-output pipelines.
* Experience supporting front\-end or extension\-based integrations (web, mobile, browser extension).


 Key Results (First 90 Days)
   

  

* Take full ownership of the assigned engineering domain.
* Ensure end\-to\-end observability and alerting for core workflows.
* Define the domain's key performance, reliability, and quality metrics.
* Identify and ship at least one high\-impact improvement.
* Establish execution cadence, priorities, and quality standards.


**Why Join** 
**Sully.ai** 
**?**
 🔥 Revolutionizing the antiquated $800B\+ Healthcare market
   

  

 🧠 60%\+ Ex\-founders who have built, scaled, exited. We hire A\-players
   

  

 ⚡️ Speed matters: we operate with urgency, autonomy, and ownership
   

  

 🧪 You’ll work on real, first\-of\-their\-kind problems at the edge of AI and medicine
   

  

 ❤️ Your work directly unlocks doctors to reclaim their time, and patients get better, faster care
   

  

*Sully.ai is an equal opportunity employer. In addition to EEO being the law, it is a policy that is fully consistent with our principles. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to status as a protected veteran or a qualified individual with a disability, or other protected status such as race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, genetic information, pregnancy or age. Sully.ai prohibits any form of workplace harassment.*

**Deputy Head of Compliance** 




**Location:** 
 Dubai, UAE

 Financial Services / Capital Markets
 



  





 We are partnering with a dynamic and forward\-thinking financial services firm in Dubai to identify a Deputy Head of Compliance who will act as a key support to the Regional Head of Compliance. This is a critical role, ideal for an individual with strong technical expertise, a collaborative mindset, and a passion for fostering a culture of integrity, ethics, and regulatory excellence.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Support the Regional Head of Compliance in overseeing adherence to applicable laws, regulatory frameworks, and internal policies across multiple jurisdictions
* Assist in the design, implementation, and ongoing enhancement of compliance policies, procedures, and control frameworks aligned with global standards and local regulations
* Partner with the Regional Head of Compliance to identify and mitigate legal, regulatory, and reputational risks, providing proactive guidance to the business

* Support the development and delivery of training programmes to embed a strong culture of compliance and ethical behaviour

* Provide support to senior management and the Board on governance and regulatory matters, ensuring alignment with international best practices
* Contribute to forward\-looking compliance guidance on new business initiatives, regulatory developments, and strategic transactions



  





**Qualifications \& Experience:** 



* Degree in Law, Business, Finance, or a related discipline; advanced qualifications (LL.M, MBA, JD) are advantageous
* Minimum 8–10 years’ experience in compliance roles within financial services, ideally within brokerage, capital markets, or investment banking
* Strong knowledge of UAE regulatory frameworks (DFSA, ADGM) and broader international regulatory environments
* Experience working within complex, cross\-border organisations, supporting senior compliance leadership
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to engage effectively with regulators, senior leadership, and internal teams.



  





 This is an excellent opportunity to work closely with senior leadership and play a key role in supporting and strengthening a high\-performing compliance function within a growing organisation.
 



  





 If this opportunity is of interest, please get in touch for a confidential discussion.

**About Mozn**
 MOZN is a leading Enterprise AI company enabling organizations to make informed decisions in two critical domains: Financial Crime Prevention and Enterprise Knowledge Intelligence.
   

  

 We’re a diverse, collaborative team of innovators united by a shared purpose: to build AI that delivers tangible business value, builds trust, and empowers people and organizations with augmented intelligence. Our culture is built on the relentless pursuit of excellence and meaningful impact.
   

  

 If you’re passionate about working alongside exceptional talent on world\-class AI, and you want the autonomy and runway to do the best work of your career, join us in shaping the future of intelligent enterprises.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As the Sales Director, you will be responsible for leading the sales strategy, business development, and revenue growth of MOZN. You will work closely with Government, financial institutions, fintech companies, and large enterprises to identify opportunities, establish partnerships, and close high\-value deals. The ideal candidate has a strong background in LLMS, AML, fraud prevention, and experience in fast\-growing B2B SaaS/tech companies.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Develop and execute a comprehensive sales and business development strategy to expand MOZN’s market presence for FOCAL and OSOS.
* Identify and engage with key decision\-makers in government, banks, fintech firms, regulators, and large enterprises to drive adoption of LLMS/ AML and fraud prevention solutions.
* Manage the end\-to\-end sales cycle, from lead generation and qualification to contract negotiation and closing.
* Build and maintain long\-term relationships with strategic clients, partners, and stakeholders.
* Stay updated on regulatory changes, industry trends, and competitive landscape to position MOZN as a market leader.
* Work closely with product, marketing, and customer success teams to align sales strategies with business objectives.
* Represent MOZN at industry events, conferences, and client meetings to promote brand awareness and thought leadership.
* Utilize CRM tools and data\-driven insights to track performance and optimize sales efforts


**Qualifications**
* 10\+ years GCC enterprise B2B sales experience, preferably within Financial Crime, AML, Risk, Compliance, or RegTech.
* Proven delivery of multi\-million USD annual quotas, with a clear record of overachievement.
* Experience closing complex, multi\-stakeholder deals ($1M\+), including RFP\-driven enterprise sales.
* Deep solution\-selling capability — able to position business value, and ROI (not product\-led selling).
* Strong regional network across tier\-1 banks, fintechs, regulators, or government entities — recognized and credible in\-market.
* Demonstrated ability to open doors independently and build pipeline without relying on brand strength.
* Experience building or scaling a market/territory from limited presence.
* Enterprise sales discipline: structured forecasting, 3–4x pipeline coverage mindset, CRM hygiene, executive engagement.
* Background from recognised regional or global enterprise technology firms.
* Senior presence, commercially mature, able to represent the company at C\-level without supervision.


**Benefits**
* You will be at the forefront of an exciting time for the Middle East, joining a high\-growth rocket\-ship in an exciting space.
* You will be given a lot of responsibility and trust. We believe that the best results come when the people responsible for a function are given the freedom to do what they think is best.
* The fundamentals will be taken care of: competitive compensation, top\-tier health insurance, and an enabling culture so that you can focus on what you do best
* You will enjoy a fun and dynamic workplace working alongside some of the greatest minds in AI.
* We believe strength lies in difference, embracing all for who they are and empowered to be the best version of themselves.

data.jd_text:
**Role Summary**
 We're looking for a sharp, curious, and commercially minded Head of Marketing Research \& Customer Experience to join our leadership team. You'll own the insight engine that powers our marketing, product, and growth decisions while ensuring every touchpoint a customer has with us is informed by real data, not gut instinct. This is a high\-impact role that sits at the intersection of research, analytics, customer strategy, and growth marketing. You'll be equal parts analyst, strategist, and storyteller \- able to translate complex data into clear actions that move the business forward.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Market \& Competitive Research**
* Lead our market intelligence function; tracking trends, competitor moves, and emerging opportunities in the fintech landscape.
* Commission and run both qual and quant research programs (surveys, focus groups, desk research, third\-party data).
* Provide leadership with regular, decision\-ready briefs on market dynamics and whitespace opportunities.
* Build and maintain a competitive intelligence framework that keeps us ahead of the curve.


**Customer Insights \& Brand Tracking**
* Own the growth VOC program end\-to\-end, designing listening posts across the customer lifecycle and turning feedback into insight
* Partner with Product, Marketing, and Commercial teams to ensure customer perspectives directly inform roadmap and GTM decisions.
* Develop and maintain rich customer personas and segmentation models that reflect how our customers actually behave.
* Own brand health tracking program with external partners and internal stakeholders


**CX Data \& Analytics**
* Work closely with our Data team to build dashboards and insight frameworks that track customer sentiment, behaviour, and experience metrics (NPS, CSAT, CES, etc.).
* Define and own the research tech stack; from survey tools to analytics platforms.
* Champion a data\-driven culture across the marketing function, raising the bar on how we measure and report on customer outcomes.
* Turn raw numbers into clear narratives for exec and board\-level audiences

data.jd_text:
We are currently partnering with a high\-growth, international business within the health and wellness space, looking to appoint a Marketing Director to lead and scale their global growth function. This is a pivotal hire for the business, with full ownership of subscriber growth across existing and new markets, including upcoming expansion into the UK and UAE.
 



  





**The Opportunity** 




 The business has already built a strong foundation, with an established subscriber base, high retention rates, and a highly engaged community. However they are now looking for a senior individual to take full ownership of the acquisition and retention engine.
 



 This role will be responsible for building a scalable growth strategy that operates independently of founder\-led channels, with a clear focus on performance, international expansion.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Own the end\-to\-end growth funnel: awareness, acquisition, conversion, and retention
* Define and execute performance marketing strategy across key channels (Meta, Google, TikTok, Apple Search Ads)
* Set and manage budgets, CPA targets, and channel allocation across multiple markets
* Lead international market entry for the UK and UAE, including go\-to\-market strategy and execution
* Optimise conversion across the funnel, including landing pages, onboarding journeys, and pricing strategies
* Drive CRM and lifecycle marketing initiatives, including email and retention strategies
* Work closely with internal teams across performance marketing, SEO, and influencer marketing to align on growth objectives
* Analyse performance data and make informed, data\-driven decisions to improve key metrics including trial conversion, retention, and LTV



  





**The Profile** 



* 5\- 7\+ years’ experience in growth or performance marketing within a subscription\-based or recurring revenue business
* Proven track record of owning and delivering against subscriber growth targets or P\&L
* Strong hands\-on experience managing paid acquisition at scale across multiple channels
* Deep understanding of conversion optimisation, retention strategies, and customer lifecycle management
* Experience launching or scaling products in new markets
* Highly data\-driven, with experience using analytics and attribution tools
* Comfortable operating in a fast\-paced, founder\-led environment with high levels of ownership



  





**Additional Information** 



* Location: Dubai Full\-time office\-based
* Reporting directly into founders
* Small team, high ownership, and strong growth potential



  





 This is an opportunity for someone who is looking to take full ownership of a growth function within a scaling business, with the ability to make a direct and measurable impact on international expansion and overall revenue growth.
 



  





 If this aligns with your background, please feel free to get in touch directly.

data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
 We are a research\-driven biopharmaceutical company. Our mission is built on the simple premise that if we “follow the science” that great medicines can make a significant impact to our world. We believe that a research\-driven enterprise dedicated to world\-class science can succeed by inventing medicine and vaccine innovations that make a difference for patients across the globe.
   

  

 Our Medical Affairs team advances patient care by engaging in scientific exchange with external medical experts and industry professionals ensuring the scientific value of our products is realized. We engage and train internal employees to ensure that they thoroughly comprehend the science behind the medicine and review further unmet medical needs to bolster collaboration and further differentiate our portfolio.
   

  

 As the Country Medical Director (CMD) and Senior Medical Leader for our company in Saudi Arabia, you will lead the Medical Affairs organization and serve as the primary country\-level contact for Medical Affairs. In this role, you will develop and execute the Medical Affairs strategy for the country, build and sustain a high\-performing, highly compliant Medical Affairs organization, manage our full portfolio and allocate resources to balance global and local priorities; represent the research arm of the company or Medical Affairs on the country Leadership Team and in cross\-functional collaborations with our Research \& Development Division, Human Health, and other functions; communicate the country’s accomplishments, opportunities, and needs to regional and global stakeholders; and represent our company externally in activities requiring the leadership and expertise of the country’s Senior Medical Leader.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
**Leadership of the Medical Affairs Organization**
* People
+ Proactively manage and develop talent, whilst identifying new opportunities vs. emerging needs by reallocating resources, upskilling the team and recruiting
+ Create an empowering, compliant, collaborative, and innovation\-focused work environment
+ Build a culture of quality and compliance through training, oversight, and collaboration


* Country Medical Affairs Plans (CMAPs)
+ Strategically develop, execute, and deliver CMAPs, including tactical deliverables for each therapeutic area, such as post\-licensure research, publication plans, investigator\-initiated studies, and other knowledge transfer activities
+ Ensure alignment of the CMAPs with global strategy and adherence to all relevant regulations, Policies and Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs)
+ Manage the country\-developed Protocol Concept Sheets (PCS), obtain regional and global approvals for new local data generation activities, and manages their execution

* Medical Affairs Management
+ Provide oversight to the country medical information team, establish processes and systems to ensure that medical information requests (MIRs) from healthcare professionals are addressed in a timely manner and in alignment with the global scientific response documents and training materials
+ Manage approved operating administrative (e.g., salaries \& travel) and life cycle management budget (e.g., advisory boards, local data generation, etc.)
+ Oversees all activities of local medical department employees
+ Oversees inspections and inspections audits, answering inquiries by health authorities, ethical committees, and internal auditors in conjunction with Regulatory, Pharmacovigilance (PV) and Global Clinical Trial Operations (GCTO)


**Collaboration With Key Internal Stakeholders**
 You will represent Medical Affairs in cross\-functional leadership teams and collaborations and advocate for the interests of the country with regional and global colleagues
   

  

* Country (or Cluster) Leadership Team
+ Represents Medical Affairs and is the “medical voice” in the country executive management team


* Global Clinical Development (GCD), Global Clinical Trial Operations (GCTO), and Global Clinical Scientific Affairs (GCSA)
+ Support GCTO when requested
+ Manage the submission and our roles in the conduct of investigator\-initiated studies
+ Lead country review of Compassionate Use Requests and Pre\-License Patient Access (PLPA) programs and facilitates Chief Medical Officer (CMO) approval of these requests

* Outcomes Research (OR), Market Access, Regulatory Affairs, HH, and Policy
+ Interact with OR, Market Access, and Global Medical Affairs experts to develop and manage observational, real\-world effectiveness and epidemiologic studies
+ Collaborate with OR, market access, regulatory and commercial colleagues by providing scientific expertise and managing the medical aspects of submissions for regulatory, reimbursement or tenders for our company’s entire portfolio of medicines and vaccines
+ Provide medical expertise to the commercial product teams, ensuring the scientific and medical value of our company’s products across all therapy areas


**Engagement With Key External Stakeholders**
* Serves as external interface with key stakeholders, insurers/government leaders, selected professional societies, medical\-scientific institutions, and the broader scientific community to lead and execute the medical research and implementation strategy for our company’s innovative medicines, ensuring that the medical community is appropriately engaged with the information they need to support patient care needs (e.g., scientific advisory boards, scientific leader (SL) engagements, webinars, and presentations)
* Collaborates with OR, Market Access, and Commercial colleagues to engage payers, policymakers, and other decision makers in support of our company’s innovative portfolio of medicines and vaccines
* Develops and/or fosters relationships with external stakeholders to ensure that robust local insights from health care providers (HCPs) and patients are gathered and integrated into local, regional, and/or global strategies, plans, and tactics, enabling the generation of data needed by payers, physicians, and patients to properly understand and value our innovative medicines and vaccines
* Participates in outcomes research/health economics engagements with national payers, Health Technology Assessment (HTA) or regulatory agencies, in coordination with OR, Market Access, and Commercial colleagues
* Provides scientific subject matter expertise for media relations and public affairs to country Communications, Corporate/External Affairs, and Public Relations teams and serves as official spokesperson for scientific matters


**What You Will Need**
* MD or equivalent degree
* Fluent in English; Arabic proficiency is preferred. Global biopharmaceutical industry experience of 5 years and above, in clinical development and/or medical affairs with demonstrated track record of success
* People\-management experience of 3 years and above.
* Demonstrated organizational skills, including ability to set goals and align priorities


**Required Skills**
 Biopharmaceuticals, Cross\-Functional Teamwork, Executive Leadership, Leadership, Medical Affairs, People Management, Stakeholder Engagement
   

  

**Preferred Skills**

All CVs / resumes submitted by search firms to any employee at our company without a valid written search agreement in place for this position will be deemed the sole property of our company. data.jd_text:
**Director of Legal Affairs** 




**Reports to:** 
 Chief Executive Officer
 



  





**About the Role** 




  





 The Director of Legal Affairs serves as the University’s chief legal authority and strategic advisor on all legal, regulatory, governance, and compliance matters. The role safeguards the institution’s legal, financial, and reputational interests while ensuring full compliance with the laws and regulations of the State of Kuwait.
 



 As a senior member of the executive leadership team, the Director operates at the intersection of governance, operations, and institutional strategy—ensuring executive decisions are legally sound, risk\-aware, and aligned with regulatory frameworks. The position requires sound judgment, discretion, and the ability to navigate complex institutional matters with professionalism and integrity.
 



 Participation in executive governance meetings and strategic institutional initiatives is expected.
 



  





**Duties and Responsibilities** 




  





**A. Legal Advisory \& Institutional Governance** 




  




* Serve as principal legal advisor to the President, Executive Council, and Board of Trustees.
* Draft and review Board resolutions, executive directives, and institutional policies.
* Advise leadership on legal implications of strategic initiatives, restructuring, and institutional development.
* Ensure governance frameworks align with Kuwaiti legal and regulatory requirements.
* Attend executive and governance meetings as required.



  





**B. Contract Management \& Risk Mitigation** 




  




* Draft, review, and negotiate employment contracts and amendments.
* Review academic and administrative agreements.
* Oversee vendor, procurement, consultancy, and service contracts.
* Review and negotiate Memoranda of Understanding (MOUs) and partnership agreements.
* Identify legal risks and provide mitigation strategies.
* Establish and maintain standardized contract templates and legal review protocols.
* Maintain centralized legal documentation and contract governance oversight.



  





**C. Regulatory Compliance \& Government Liaison** 




  




* Ensure institutional compliance with:
* Kuwait Labor Law
* Ministry of Interior (MOI) regulations
* Public Authority for Manpower (PAM) regulations
* Residency and work permit regulations
* Higher education regulatory requirements
* Applicable data protection and privacy laws
* Liaise with government authorities, regulators, and external legal counsel as required.
* Oversee legal aspects of licensing, regulatory submissions, and institutional approvals.



  





**D. Employment \& Disciplinary Oversight** 




  




* Provide legal oversight on employee disciplinary matters, terminations, grievances, investigations, and misconduct cases.
* Ensure policy enforcement and compliance across the institution.
* Support HR leadership in complex or high\-risk employment cases.
* Advise on legally compliant documentation and procedural processes.



  





**E. Litigation \& Dispute Management** 




  




* Manage external legal counsel and oversee litigation strategy.
* Lead institutional response to legal claims, disputes, and investigations.
* Provide recommendations on settlement negotiations and risk exposure.
* Maintain confidential legal records and case management documentation.



  





**F. Policy Development \& Institutional Protection** 




  




* Review and approve institutional policies prior to issuance.
* Ensure alignment between HR, Finance, Academic Affairs, and regulatory requirements.
* Develop standardized legal templates to minimize operational risk.
* Conduct periodic legal risk assessments for new initiatives and structural changes.
* Protect institutional intellectual property, trademarks, and brand integrity.



  





**Minimum Qualifications** 




  




* Bachelor’s Degree in Law (LLB) from a recognized institution.
* Master’s Degree in Law (LLM) preferred.
* Legally qualified and admitted to practice law in a recognized jurisdiction.
* Minimum of 10–15 years of progressive legal experience.
* At least 5 years in a senior legal leadership role (Head of Legal / Legal Director / Senior Counsel).
* Strong working knowledge of Kuwaiti labor, commercial, and regulatory law.
* Experience within higher education or regulated institutions preferred.
* Demonstrated experience managing complex contracts and governance matters.
* Experience working within a multicultural and multi\-linguistic environment.
* High level of discretion, integrity, and executive presence.



  





**About American International University** 




  





  





 AIU is a new institution of higher education in Kuwait whose first student cohort was admitted in fall 2019\. It is a private, coeducational institution offering undergraduate degrees based on the American model of higher education, including a comprehensive general education curriculum. Through its educational and student services programming, the University serves the intellectual, cultural, and personal growth of all members of its community. AIU offers degree programs in Film and Digital Media, Architecture, and Design, Engineering, and Business Administration where the language of instruction is English.
 



  





 For more information about AIU visit: www.aiu.edu.kw
 



  





**How to Apply** 




 To apply for this position, please visit the Job Opportunities section of our webpage and submit your resume, cover letter, and reel to: https://aiu.edu.kw/careers/jobs

data.jd_text:
**JOB DESCRIPTION** 




 Job Title: Head of Supply Chain \& Global Logistics or Global Supply Chain Operations Manager
 



 Location: Dubai, UAE
 



 Department: Supply Chain
 



 Experience: Minimum 8\+ years in international supply chain \& logistics management
 



 Languages: Native Mandarin \& Fluent English
 



  





 Reports to: Managing Director / CEO
 



 Direct Reports:
 


1. Dubai Supply Chain Team \- Logistics Executives, Documentation Officers \& Order Processing Coordinators
2. QC Coordinators (India \& China – dotted line reporting)
3. Country/Regional Heads of Import Operations (functional oversight)



  





  





**Role Overview** 




 He/She will lead and oversee the entire end\-to\-end international supply chain operations across China, India, Dubai, and African import markets.
 



 This role will act as the central control tower for sourcing, quality control, logistics coordination, order processing, shipment clearance monitoring, and strategic reorder planning.
 



 The Dubai supply team will report directly to this position.
 



  





  





**Strategic Impact of This Role in Your Business** 




 For your type of trading company this person becomes:
 


* Your supply chain command center
* Risk control mechanism
* QC controller
* Cost optimizer
* Shipment delay reducer
* And long\-term scaling pillar



  





  





**Key Responsibilities** 



1. **Strategic Supply Chain Leadership**


* Oversee complete end\-to\-end supply chain operations from supplier to final import destination.
* Act as functional head of logistics and import coordination.
* Develop supply chain strategy to ensure timely product availability across markets.


1. **Supplier \& Sourcing Coordination (China \& India)**


* Coordinate orders, production planning, and quality control procedures with supply offices.
* Oversee QC teams to ensure compliance with specifications and checklists.
* Ensure adherence to agreed standards, specifications, packaging, labeling, port instructions and documentation.


1. **Dubai Operations Control**


* Supervise Dubai\-based supply team.
* Ensure all orders are processed accurately and on time.
* Validate shipping instructions, specifications, and documentation prior to dispatch.
* Monitor container planning and shipment scheduling.


1. **Import \& Clearing Coordination (Africa Markets)**


* Coordinate with on\-ground import teams for:
* Clearing status
* Shipment tracking
* Claims handling
* Feedback reporting
* Resolve shipment discrepancies and manage supplier claims.


1. **Reorder Planning \& Supply Strategy**


* Work with import teams to forecast demand.
* Plan reorder cycles considering clearing timelines and port delays.
* Optimize lead times and working capital efficiency.


1. **Quality Control Oversight**


* Supervise QC processes in China, India, and import destinations.
* Establish SOPs for inspection and compliance.
* Ensure product consistency across markets.


1. **Team Leadership**


* Lead Dubai supply chain team.
* Establish KPIs and accountability structure.
* Improve operational efficiency and reporting transparency.



  





  





**Ideal Candidate Profile** 



* 8\+ years of international supply chain leadership experience
* Experience managing cross\-border sourcing (China mandatory; India preferred)
* Strong knowledge of international shipping, Incoterms, documentation, and clearing processes
* Experience managing QC teams
* Strong negotiation and vendor management skills
* Mandarin (Native), English (Fluent)
* Experience handling Africa\-bound shipments is a major advantage
* Strong ERP and order management system exposure



  





  





  





  





**KPIs** 



1. On\-Time Shipment Rate: Target: 95%\+ shipments dispatched as per planned schedule
2. Order Accuracy / Specification \& Checklist Errors: Target: 99% documentation \& specification accuracy
3. Inventory Stock\-Out Rate: Target: \< 3% stock\-outs per quarter
4. Quality Compliance Rate: Target: \< 2% product rejection or claims rate
5. Cost Savings / Freight Optimization: \> 8% improvement over last year
6. Claim Resolution Time: Target: Resolve supplier/shipment claims within 14 days
7. Team Performance \& Reporting: Monthly reporting accuracy and transparency

With a strong international footprint and a rapidly expanding user base, the organization is scaling its global marketing function to drive acquisition, retention, and revenue growth across multiple regulated markets.
 



 They are seeking a Head of Performance Marketing to lead and scale all paid acquisition efforts, optimize marketing ROI, and drive high\-quality trader acquisition across global markets.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Leading the global performance marketing strategy across all paid channels including Google, Meta, programmatic, affiliate networks, and emerging acquisition platforms, with a strong focus on trader acquisition and deposit\-driven growth
* Owning and optimizing customer acquisition funnels end\-to\-end, from first touchpoint through to funded accounts and trading activity, ensuring strong conversion and lifetime value
* Managing and scaling multi\-million dollar marketing budgets, ensuring efficient allocation across channels, geographies, and campaigns based on performance data and ROI metrics
* Driving data\-led decision\-making, leveraging analytics tools (e.g., GA4, AppsFlyer, Adjust, internal BI tools) to monitor CAC, CPA, ROAS, LTV, and cohort performance
* Collaborating closely with Product, CRM, Sales, and Dealing teams to align acquisition strategies with trading behavior, client segmentation, and retention initiatives
* Overseeing paid media execution and optimization, including campaign structure, audience targeting, bidding strategies, creatives, and landing page performance
* Building and managing high\-performing internal teams and external agencies, ensuring accountability, performance tracking, and continuous improvement
* Developing and executing A/B testing frameworks across creatives, landing pages, funnels, and messaging to improve conversion rates and reduce acquisition costs
* Ensuring compliance with regulatory and platform policies across all marketing activities, particularly in highly regulated financial services markets
* Identifying and scaling new acquisition channels and growth opportunities, including affiliates, influencers, partnerships, and alternative media sources
* Driving localization strategies across key markets to ensure campaigns are tailored to regional behaviors, languages, and regulatory environments



  





**Requirements** 



* Proven experience in a senior performance marketing leadership role within Forex, CFDs, online trading, or closely related financial services environments
* Strong understanding of trader acquisition funnels, including KYC onboarding, deposits, and trading activation metrics
* Demonstrated success managing large\-scale paid media budgets with clear ownership of ROI, CAC, and revenue impact
* Deep expertise in platforms such as Google Ads, Meta Ads, programmatic networks, and affiliate ecosystems
* Strong analytical mindset with hands\-on experience using performance tracking tools, attribution models, and data visualization platforms
* Experience working in regulated environments, with a clear understanding of compliance requirements across different jurisdictions
* Ability to translate complex data into clear, actionable insights for executive leadership
* Proven leadership experience managing cross\-functional teams and external partners
* Strong commercial awareness with a focus on revenue growth, cost efficiency, and scalability
* Experience in multi\-region / global campaigns, particularly across MENA, Europe, and Asia is highly preferred

data.jd_text:
**Our Purpose**
*Mastercard powers economies and empowers people in 200\+ countries and territories worldwide. Together with our customers, we’re helping build a sustainable economy where everyone can prosper. We support a wide range of digital payments choices, making transactions secure, simple, smart and accessible. Our technology and innovation, partnerships and networks combine to deliver a unique set of products and services that help people, businesses and governments realize their greatest potential.*
**Title And Summary**
 Senior Vice President, Public Sector, EEMEA
   

  

 Location is flexible but must be in EEMEA region.
   

  

 Who is Mastercard?
   

  

 Mastercard is a global technology company in the payments industry. Our mission is to connect and power an inclusive, digital economy that benefits everyone, everywhere by making transactions safe, simple, smart, and accessible. Using secure data and networks, partnerships and passion, our innovations and solutions help individuals, financial institutions, governments, and businesses realize their greatest potential.
   

  

 Our decency quotient, or DQ, drives our culture and everything we do inside and outside of our company. With connections across more than 210 countries and territories, we are building a sustainable world that unlocks priceless possibilities for all.
   

  

**Overview**
 Mastercard is dedicated to promoting inclusive growth and financial inclusion. The mandate of the Regional Public Sector unit is to build durable, trusted relationships with key government agencies to accelerate their transition to a cashless ecosystem though digitalization, while increasing revenues and seeding new markets for Mastercard. We drive relevance and revenues in the government space by developing effective regional go to market programs supported by clear priorities, success metrics and incentives. We provide expert sales support to both country managers and local sales resources through a solid client engagement playbook approach. We guide the transition from reactive solutions sales to strategic public sector programs. And we ensure alignment between regional demand and our global solutions.
   

  

* The Regional Public Sector Senior Vice President role focuses on aligning Mastercard’s


 product, service and ecosystem capabilities to solve for the challenges government client face today in the areas of financial inclusion, citizen service efficiency, inclusive economic growth and government operational excellence. We do this by engaging, listening and leading. Our regional team is comprised of industry leaders, relationship builders and deal closers. We apply Mastercard’s digital tools, business insights, last mile solutions and market organizing skills to support client success. We also have a passion for learning, exploring new capabilities, and applying the best methodologies and insights to the government business.
   

  

* This role is at the heart of our intent to scale our business across all regions to drive revenue, market


 relevance and social impact. The unit is regionally deployed and focuses on a select number of priority
   

  

 markets, segments and clients, directly agreed with the senior leadership in the region.
   

  

* The Regional Public Sector SVP is accountable for:
* The development of the regional government vision, strategy and execution program including a list of prioritized markets, clients and solution opportunities.
* Identify and pursue opportunities in digitizing big government flows, transformational infrastructure partnerships, major transit and tourism initiatives
* The acceleration of Mastercard’s revenue performance in the region, through a structured and diligent sales excellence approach.
* The effective management of a growing team of senior government specialists across target markets, in a peer alignment to the Divisional Presidents.
* The effective representation of the Public Sector business opportunity within the region’s senior management team, as well as the negotiation of the related revenue and relevance objectives with other members of the management team.
* The alignment of global, regional and local resources to drive execution, in close coordination with the Region’s President, the Divisional Presidents, the regional product and service units and the Mastercard Strategic Growth management team.
* Direct engagement on key government opportunities, at the top civil servant and political government executive level, developing the business opportunities across the region, assisting country managers and helping win strategic deals.
* Capacity building at the markets level by training sales on relevant Mastercard solutions, narrative and client references.
* The establishment and management of a regional community of practice to cross\-fertilize regional and global best practices.
* This position reports directly to EVP, Market Development \- EEMEA with a dotted line reporting relationship into the Global Lead, Public Sector Center of Excellence. Location is flexible but must be in region.


 Role
   

  

* Primary accountability for development and execution of the regional government strategy, starting


**From**
* Develop a deep understanding of regional, national and local priorities.
* Engaging region and division leadership in a peer fashion to prioritize clients and solution opportunities. Negotiate and secure local support of resources, aligning them to execution.
* Securing global and regional resources to execute on the plan and drive marquee wins. Build a region\-wide Public Sector extended steering committee including peers in the Public Policy, Legal, Services, Consumer and commercial products, O\&T and Delivery units.
* Lead a team of segment experts, helping them growing in their roles by active coaching and talent planning
* Accelerate solutions deployment by providing regional trainings to own team and other in market units, provide expert sales support for marquee engagements.
* Liaison with the peers across the five global regions of MA and the Global PS team to represent EEMEA and draw on expertise and market development support
* Personally initiate and drive marquee, commercial deals.
* Represent the Region within Strategic Growth’s management team. Drive strategic alignment with global units.
* Build and curate the regional community of practice. Mobilize the team to act as first line of support for regional \& divisional presidents for thought leadership and strategic engagements.


**All About You**
* Experience working for or closely with government agencies, managing process improvement and


 transformative change initiatives, as well as proven experience in engaging very senior government
   

  

 leaders to build durable relations.
   

  

* Proven track in leading and closing large and complex government deals in the region.
* Consultative selling focused, with deep product, services, and solutions expertise and hands\-on approach
* Adept at interacting with senior Mastercard stakeholders – in terms of engagement, communication and transparency of purpose. Can skillfully lead complex regional initiatives that require collaboration across functional, geographical and cultural lines.
* Demonstrated ability to work across divisional boundaries, within the region, acting as peer to other senior leaders.
* Self\-motivated, thrives in a fast\-paced environment; readiness to take\-on stretch goals.
* Strong gravitas, exceptional relationship management, influencing and communication skills.
* Open to travel across the region and globally
* English fluency is required. At least one other regional language a strong plus.


**Corporate Security Responsibility**
 All activities involving access to Mastercard assets, information, and networks comes with an inherent risk to the organization and, therefore, it is expected that every person working for, or on behalf of, Mastercard is responsible for information security and must:
   

  

* Abide by Mastercard’s security policies and practices;
* Ensure the confidentiality and integrity of the information being accessed;
* Report any suspected information security violation or breach, and
* Complete all periodic mandatory security trainings in accordance with Mastercard’s guidelines.

data.jd_text:
Every day, tens of millions of people come to Roblox to explore, create, play, learn, and connect with friends in 3D immersive digital experiences– all created by our global community of developers and creators.
   

  

 At Roblox, we’re building the tools and platform that empower our community to bring any experience that they can imagine to life. Our vision is to reimagine the way people come together, from anywhere in the world, and on any device. We’re on a mission to connect a billion people with optimism and civility, and looking for amazing talent to help us get there.
   

  

 A career at Roblox means you’ll be working to shape the future of human interaction, solving unique technical challenges at scale, and helping to create safer, more civil shared experiences for everyone.
   

  

 As the Director of MENA Public Policy you will develop and implement an engagement strategy with key policymakers, stakeholders, and opinion leaders across MENA. The successful candidate will oversee critical issues including, but not limited to, gaming, child safety, artificial intelligence, privacy, and consumer protection.
   

  

 The ideal candidate is a strategic thinker, driven to develop and execute creative strategies that advance Roblox’s business and priorities within the region. This position is based in Dubai and reports directly to the Head of Public Policy, Europe and MENA. The Director of MENA Public Policy will play a critical part in shaping Roblox's future in the country by establishing and executing effective public policy strategies. This role is instrumental in ensuring compliance, addressing policy issues, and fostering strong relationships with external partners, ultimately contributing to a safer and more engaging environment for Roblox's global community of developers and creators.
   

  

**You Will**
* Maintain and build relationships with regional policymakers and political figures
* Identify, monitor, and analyze policy issues affecting Roblox in MENA
* Develop and execute policy strategies around issues important to Roblox
* Assist the wider public policy team on ongoing projects and initiatives
* Advise Roblox internal stakeholders on policy matters as inputs to the development of our products and business operations
* Articulate Roblox’s public policy positions and produce briefing papers and consultation responses
* Empowered to fully pursue both your personal life and career goals, with support to take on increasing responsibilities and calculated risks for growth


**You Have**
* Bachelor's degree or higher in Political Science, Public Policy, Law, International Relations, Media, Technology, or related field of study or equivalent
* 10\+ years of experience working with policymakers and stakeholders in MENA
* Deep knowledge of the MENA policymaking and public opinion process
* Extensive experience in intelligence collection and analysis, strategy development, project management, cross\-functional partnership
* Strong communication skills, verbal and written


**You Are**
* Passionate about public policy issues in MENA
* A solutions\-driven and results\-oriented strategic thinker
* A dynamic and engaging presenter with stellar oral delivery
* Detail\-oriented, with strong communication, planning and organizational skills
* Self\-directed, with the ability to define your own work and processes
* A team player, who values collaboration and partnership
* You are a professional who approaches every individual as a client, regardless of their position, maintaining a calm and professional demeanor


 Roles that are based in an office are onsite Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday, with optional presence on Monday and Friday (unless otherwise noted).
   

  

 Roblox provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local laws. Roblox also provides reasonable accommodations to candidates with qualifying disabilities or religious beliefs during the recruiting process.

data.jd_text:
Qiddiya Investment Company is transforming the entertainment landscape in Saudi Arabia, and we are in search of a strategic and commercially driven professional to fill the role of
 **Director \- Development Financial Planning** 
 within the Commercial Office Business Unit.
   

  

 This position is pivotal in shaping our development strategy through comprehensive business planning, financial \& investment strategy, and commercial analysis for proposed Qiddiya City office assets, with total investment value exceeding several billion dollars over time.
   

  

 As the Director of Development Financial Planning, you will be responsible for establishing the strategic direction and commercial framework for various commercial office development projects.
   

  

 You will serve as a key member of the Office BU senior leadership team and be instrumental in driving investment decisions, optimizing capital allocation, and ensuring our projects deliver exceptional returns while aligning with Qiddiya's long\-term vision.
   

  

 Day to day you will be partnering with development leaders, strategy teams and key stakeholders to shape the future of world\-class sports assets and facilities. With that in mind, outstanding commercial acumen, strategic leadership, and the ability to influence at the highest levels are essential, while experience in Commercial Office Finance Development would be beneficial given the role's strategic focus.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Drive the strategic planning function for the Commercial Office Business Unit, including development of investment strategies, business plans, and financial frameworks for multiple billion\-dollar development projects
* Provide complex feasibility studies and strategic assessments for major development initiatives, including guidance on capital structure, funding options, and risk management strategies
* Drive capital optimization and investment strategy, ensuring sophisticated financial modeling and strategic assessment of all investments while maximizing shareholder value
* Lead the development of innovative commercial models and revenue strategies for office assets in collaboration with the senior leadership team
* Foster strategic relationships with key stakeholders, financial institutions, and partners to drive business growth and secure optimal financing solutions
* Spearhead transformation initiatives in financial and commercial strategy to ensure executive decision making is based on best\-in\-class analysis and thinking
* Lead strategic due diligence and valuation of potential investments, partnerships, and development opportunities
* Develop and implement sophisticated financial planning and analysis frameworks to drive strategic decision\-making at board level
* Guide long\-term financial forecasting and scenario planning to optimize portfolio performance and returns
* Direct the creation of board\-level business cases and investment proposals, including detailed ROI analysis and risk assessment
* Establish best practices in business planning and financial strategy across the organization
* Lead change management initiatives to improve financial planning processes and drive operational excellence
* Monitor industry trends and best practices in office development and development financial analysis to inform decision\-making and strategic objectives


**Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree in finance, economics, real estate, or a related field
* A minimum of 15\-18 years of relevant experience in financial analysis, with a focus on commercial development or real estate finance
* Early experience at a leading management consultancy and subsequent operational or client\-side roles are preferred but not mandatory
* Proven track record of leading financial strategy and business planning for large\-scale development projects
* Experience in financial planning and business strategy for commercial office assets is highly desirable
* Demonstrated expertise in capital markets, project finance, and investment strategy
* Strong background in developing and implementing commercial frameworks and revenue optimization strategies
* Distinguished expertise in business planning, financial modeling, and strategic analysis for complex development projects
* Exceptional critical thinking and strategic problem\-solving abilities, with demonstrated capability to drive innovation and challenge conventional approaches
* Outstanding executive presence and communication skills, with proven ability to influence and engage at board and C\-suite levels
* Strong leadership capabilities, with demonstrated success in building and developing high\-performing teams
* Advanced proficiency in Excel financial modeling, strategic planning tools, and enterprise\-level planning systems


**Benefits**
 Offering a comprehensive compensation and benefits package.

**Be Part of a Legacy Bigger Than the Game**




 At
 **Al\-Qadsiah Club** 
 we create more than teams! We’re crafting a legacy that goes beyond the game, making an impact both on and off the field. Driven by ambition, synergy, and innovation, we aim to inspire generations while shaping the future of Saudi sports.
   





 This is more than just a job! It’s an opportunity to be part of something larger than yourself. At Al\-Qadsiah, you’ll play a key role in shaping our legacy, contributing to the nation’s sports vision, and making history every step of the way.
   




**Overview:**
 Al\-Qadsiah Club is seeking a dynamic and innovative Head of Social Media to oversee the club’s digital presence. The ideal candidate will have a passion for sports and social media, a strategic mindset, and the ability to lead and inspire a team. This individual will be responsible for shaping and executing the social media strategy to enhance the club's online presence, fan engagement, and brand visibility.
   

  

 This role offers a unique opportunity to build and lead the social media function, define the club’s digital voice, and deliver impactful, high\-quality content across key moments, campaigns, and sporting milestones. Working at the intersection of sport, entertainment, and culture, the successful candidate will drive audience growth, strengthen fan engagement, and position Al\-Qadsiah Club as a leading digital presence, while operating in a fast\-paced, high\-performance environment with strong opportunities for ownership, creativity, and career growth.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
 1\. Social Media Strategy Development
   

  

 • Create and implement a comprehensive social media strategy to increase brand awareness, fan engagement, and drive club objectives.
   

 • Develop campaigns that align with club events, promotions, and sports seasons.
   

  

 2\. Content Creation \& Management
   

  

 • Oversee content creation, including graphics, videos, and copywriting, to ensure alignment with the club's brand identity.
   

 • Manage the editorial calendar for social media platforms, ensuring timely and relevant content.
   

  

 3\. Community Engagement \& Growth
   

  

 • Engage with fans and followers across platforms by responding to comments, messages, and managing fan interactions.
   

 • Develop and execute strategies to grow the club’s social media following across various platforms.
   

  

 4\. Analytics \& Reporting
   

  

 • Monitor and analyze social media metrics to evaluate the effectiveness of campaigns and strategies.
   

 • Produce monthly reports with insights and recommendations to improve social media performance.
   

  

 5\.Team Leadership \& Collaboration:
   

  

 • Lead and mentor a team of social media specialists and content creators.
   

 • Collaborate with marketing, public relations, and other departments to ensure cohesive brand messaging across all platforms.
   

  

  

 Requirements
   

  

**Qualifications:**
 • Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Media, or a related field.
   

  

**Experience:**
 • Minimum of 5\-7 years of experience in social media management, with at least 2 years in a leadership role. Previous experience in the sports industry or managing social media for sports teams or brands is highly desirable.
   

 • Experience with major social media platforms (Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, etc.) and their algorithms.
   

  

**Skills:**
 • Strong understanding of digital marketing strategies, analytics, and tools.
   

 • Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
   

 • Creativity and ability to think outside the box to drive engagement and brand recognition.
   

 • Strong organizational skills with the ability to multitask and prioritize tasks in a fast\-paced environment.
   

 • Strong understanding of fan behavior and the ability to tailor content to sports enthusiasts.
   

  

**Preferred Certifications:**
 • Social Media Marketing Certification
   

 • Adobe Creative Suite or similar
   

  

  

 Benefits
   

  


**Why Join Al\-Qadsiah?**



* **Be Part of the Legacy:** 
 Join a club that’s redefining the future of Saudi sports, striving to lead the competition and set new standards of excellence.
* **Experience the Culture:** 
 Thrive in an environment that values
 **quality, accountability, diversity, synergy, innovation, and ambition, while embracing harmony** 
 . This is the Qadsiah Way!

We are seeking a Head of Operations \& Sales for our water business in the UAE (or GCC, depending on business scope). This role offers a salary package of AED 12,000 – AED 15,000 plus performance\-linked incentives.
   

  

 This is a hands\-on position requiring a leader who understands the complexities of last\-mile delivery, fleet optimization, and high\-frequency sales. You will take full ownership of operations, ensuring end\-to\-end operational excellence, P\&L management, and driving aggressive revenue growth.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities include:
   

  

* Operations Leadership: Manage daily delivery operations, route planning, and fleet utilization to minimize costs. Oversee drivers, helpers, and vehicle maintenance while ensuring compliance with hygiene and regulatory standards.
* Sales \& Revenue Growth: Drive B2B, B2C, and bulk sales performance. Build and manage field sales and telesales teams to execute subscription plans and corporate deals.
* P\&L Ownership: Control operational costs and optimize margins. Forecast demand to align production with delivery capacity.
* Customer Retention: Reduce churn through effective delivery schedules and proactive service recovery. Monitor repeat order rates and subscription renewals.
* Process Improvement: Implement systems for route optimization, order management, and subscription tracking to automate processes.


 Mandatory requirements include:
   

  

* Minimum 10\+ years of experience in the UAE water industry (bottled/bulk/5\-gallon).
* Proven track record in both Operations and Sales.
* Strong experience managing a blue\-collar workforce and fleet operations.
* Deep understanding of subscription\-based delivery models.
* Valid UAE Driving License.

data.jd_text:
Our Group aspires to be a world\-class, professional global company with deep\-rooted business fundamentals. Our success is driven by hiring and developing the most efficient and dynamic people and implementing advanced information systems. We are currently seeking a highly professional and experienced Executive Secretary to provide comprehensive, high\-level administrative support to our Chief Executive Officer (CEO) and Vice President (VP). The ideal candidate will be a proactive, organised, and discreet individual capable of managing a demanding workload in a fast\-paced environment. This role is critical to ensuring the smooth and efficient operation of our executive office.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Manage and maintain the complex and demanding schedules of the CEO and VP, including arranging appointments, meetings, and conferences.
* Coordinate all aspects of executive travel, including booking flights, accommodation, and ground transportation, and preparing detailed itineraries.
* Prepare and edit correspondence, communications, presentations, and other documents on behalf of the executives.
* Act as the primary point of contact between the executives and internal/external stakeholders, screening and directing phone calls and emails.
* Organise and attend meetings, ensuring the executives are well\-prepared; this includes taking minutes, distributing them, and following up on agreed action points.
* Handle confidential information with the utmost discretion and integrity.
* Manage executive expenses, process invoices, and assist with budget tracking for the executive office.
* Conduct research and compile data to prepare documents for review and presentation by executives.
* Maintain an efficient and organised filing system for both electronic and physical documents.

data.jd_text:

* Handle confidential information with the utmost discretion and integrity.
* Manage executive expenses, process invoices, and assist with budget tracking for the executive office.
* Conduct research and compile data to prepare documents for review and presentation by executives.

* High proficiency in the complete Microsoft Office Suite (Outlook, Word, Excel, PowerPoint).
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English; fluency in Arabic is highly advantageous.
* A high degree of professionalism, discretion, and an understanding of the importance of confidentiality.
* The ability to work independently, remain calm under pressure, and meet tight deadlines.
* A proactive approach to problem\-solving with strong decision\-making capabilities.
* A bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Secretarial Studies, or a related field is preferred.


**Benefits**
* A competitive remuneration package.
* An opportunity to work in a dynamic and professional environment that supports career growth and development.
* Play an integral role within a forward\-thinking company that is a leader in its field.

 This role is a senior executive position with full ownership of the global marketing organization, responsible for shaping strategy, dri
data.jd_text:
**This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Vice President of Global Marketing in Saudi Arabia.**
 This role is a senior executive position with full ownership of the global marketing organization, responsible for shaping strategy, driving pipeline, and scaling revenue impact across enterprise and product\-led growth channels. You will lead diverse teams across brand, communications, demand generation, product marketing, events, and SDR functions, while collaborating closely with Sales, Product, RevOps, and executive leadership. The role demands a strategic thinker with a proven ability to execute global campaigns, optimize marketing performance, and strengthen enterprise engagement. You will have a direct impact on growth, market positioning, and operational excellence in a fast\-paced, high\-growth SaaS environment. The ideal candidate thrives in ambiguity, balances strategic oversight with hands\-on execution, and inspires teams to deliver measurable results globally.
   

  

**Accountabilities**
* Lead and own the global marketing function end\-to\-end, including demand generation, brand, communications, product marketing, events, and SDR teams.
* Drive pipeline creation, marketing\-sourced revenue, and overall marketing contribution to global business growth.
* Define and execute a hybrid go\-to\-market strategy combining enterprise sales and product\-led growth to optimize acquisition and expansion.
* Build and scale a high\-performing global demand generation engine focused on pipeline velocity, conversion, and ROI.
* Partner with Sales, RevOps, Product, and executive leadership to align on strategy, pipeline targets, and forecasting accuracy.
* Own brand positioning, PR, and communications strategy to ensure a compelling, consistent narrative across enterprise decision\-makers.
* Enhance global events and field marketing initiatives to accelerate engagement and shorten deal cycles.
* Measure, analyze, and improve marketing performance using analytics and attribution frameworks.
* Build, mentor, and lead high\-performing, distributed marketing teams while promoting a culture of inclusivity and operational excellence.


**Requirements**
* 15\+ years of marketing leadership experience, including executive\-level responsibility in global B2B SaaS organizations.
* Proven track record in pipeline and revenue\-driven marketing, enterprise demand generation, brand strategy, PR/communications, and SDR leadership.
* Strong strategic, analytical, and problem\-solving skills with the ability to navigate ambiguity in fast\-paced, high\-growth environments.
* Demonstrated success in partnering with Sales to drive alignment, accountability, and predictable revenue growth.
* Experience marketing to enterprise leadership with a deep understanding of complex enterprise buying cycles.
* Excellent communication, collaboration, and cross\-functional leadership skills across diverse, distributed teams.
* Comfort with product\-led growth models alongside enterprise sales motions, and familiarity with martech or developer\-focused platforms is a plus.
* Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, or related field, or equivalent practical experience.


**Benefits**
* Competitive salary with performance\-based incentives and potential equity opportunities.
* Flexible work arrangements, supporting remote and hybrid setups.
* Health, wellness, and related benefits programs to support physical, mental, and financial well\-being.
* Professional development opportunities, including leadership programs and access to extensive learning resources.
* Paid time off, company holidays, and leave policies supporting work\-life balance.
* Opportunity to lead a globally distributed team and make a measurable impact on enterprise growth and brand presence.

**Job Title** 
 ：Fundraising Expert (Middle East Region)
 



**Department** 
 ：JD Property Development Fundraising Team
 



**Work Location** 
 ：Middle East Region (Local Office)
 



**Job Responsibilities** 



* Be responsible for the entire fundraising process of JD Property Development in the Middle East region. Formulate and implement regional fundraising plans in conjunction with the company's strategic layout, expand and maintain core local capital channels in the Middle East, and achieve fundraising targets.
* Tap various capital resources in the Middle East region (including but not limited to sovereign funds, family offices, private equity funds, etc.), establish long\-term and stable cooperative relationships, and deepen the layout of local resources.
* Take the lead in conducting fundraising negotiations, due diligence coordination, agreement promotion and other related work, cooperate with internal teams to complete the closed\-loop of the entire fundraising chain, and ensure that the fundraising work is carried out in a compliant and efficient manner.
* Track the dynamics, policy changes and industry trends of the fundraising market in the Middle East region, output market analysis reports, and provide professional suggestions for the adjustment of the company's regional fundraising strategy.
* Integrate into the team and make up for the shortcomings of the existing team's communication style, promote cross\-departmental and cross\-regional collaboration with a structured work method, convey the concept of efficient communication, and improve the overall fundraising efficiency of the team.



**Requirements (Hard Criteria)** 



* Work Experience: 5\-7 years and above of relevant fundraising work experience, with mature practical experience in fundraising, and priority will be given to candidates with complete fundraising project landing cases.
* Local Resources: Must have existing local capital resources and channels in the Middle East, be familiar with the rules and culture of the local fundraising market in the Middle East, and be able to quickly connect with local core capital parties.
* Professional Background: Priority is given to candidates from private equity (PE), fundraising consulting companies and other related fields, with relevant industry resources and professional accumulation.



**Requirements (Competency Criteria)** 



* Communication Skills: Fluent in spoken and written English, which can be used as the working language; able to conduct English negotiations, reports and cross\-cultural communications without obstacles. Possess structured communication logic, express rigorously and efficiently, and be good at accurately conveying core needs.
* Goal\-Oriented: Strong sense of goal, with clear ability to decompose fundraising goals and executive power; able to actively respond to various challenges in the fundraising process and ensure the timely achievement of fundraising indicators.
* Entrepreneurship: Strong initiative and pioneering awareness, dare to break through conventions, be able to promote fundraising work from an entrepreneur's perspective, actively explore potential opportunities, and help the company achieve breakthroughs in the fundraising layout in the Middle East region.
* Work Style: Possess a high degree of structured thinking, work in an organized, process\-oriented and summary\-oriented manner; be able to improve fundraising efficiency with standardized work methods, make up for the shortcomings of the existing team's communication style, and adapt to the needs of team collaboration.
* Professionalism: Integrity and reliability, with good professional ethics, strong pressure resistance, able to independently take on the responsibility of regional fundraising, and at the same time have excellent team collaboration awareness.



**Company Introduction** 




 JD Property Development is the core platform under JD.com focusing on industrial real estate investment, development, operation and asset management. Relying on JD.com's industrial advantages, it layouts core industrial clusters around the world and is committed to building an integrated ecology of "industry \+ space \+ service". At present, the company is accelerating the expansion of its business in the Middle East region, and sincerely invites outstanding fundraising talents to join us to build a new blueprint for the global industrial layout.
 



**Application Method** 




 Please send your personal Chinese and English resumes to the designated recruitment email, with the email subject marked as "Fundraising Expert (Middle East) \- Name \- Contact Information". We will screen the resumes as soon as possible after receiving them and contact the qualified candidates.

data.raw_snippet:
**Position:** 
 Assistant Vice President \- Fiduciary

**About Us**
