data.jd_text:
**Position:** 
 Assistant Vice President \- Fiduciary
 



**Location:** 
 Dubai (Hybrid)
 








**About Us**






  





 The Maples Group is a global leader in financial services, trusted by many of the world’s largest hedge fund managers, private equity firms, and international corporations. Our side\-by\-side financial and legal teams consistently deliver award\-winning services to a global client base, offering unrivalled learning and career opportunities to our 2,500 colleagues worldwide.
 



  





**What is it like to work here?**






  





 We are driven to excel, and collaboration is key to our continued success. We can go further for our clients because we go further for each other too. Our inclusive culture creates an environment where people can be themselves at work while doing their best work. No matter where you work in the Maples Group, you will be part of a global team.
 



  





**The Opportunity**




  





 We are looking for an accomplished Assistant Vice President to join our Fiduciary team as part of our financial services business in Dubai.
 



  





 Established in 2008, our Dubai office is the Maples Group’s regional operating hub in the Middle East. A commitment to service excellence and investment in our people has led to continued growth where our teammates deliver best\-in\-class solutions to clients worldwide alongside our colleagues in legal services.
 



  





 The Assistant Vice President (“AVP”) within the Dubai Fiduciary team report to the Regional Head of Fiduciary are responsible for undertaking a high number of new business/transactions, whether fiduciary or administrative in nature.
 



  





 Your primary responsibilities include:
 



  





*Client Work and Client Service* 




  




* Being the assigned administrator responsible for a portfolio of clients;
* Responsible for preparing management accounts or financial statements from available source documents;
* Correspond with the clients about source documents and other details required for preparing the management accounts or the financial statements;
* Liaise with auditors, lawyers, investment managers or other parties related to the company when required to prepare the reports;
* Assist with Audit of financial statements;
* Assist clients for filing FATCA/CRS, ESR and CIT;
* reviewing transaction documents, providing written comments to parties as appropriate or attending conference calls as required;
* liaising with arrangers, investment managers, lawyers and other relevant parties concerning the setting up of new business as well as acting as a primary point of contact for ongoing issue resolution;
* ensuring files are compliant with MaplesFS procedures and policies;
* ensuring all relevant MaplesFS databases are completed and maintained with accurate information in relation to assigned portfolio of clients;
* ensuring all annual administration in respect of a client is completed in accordance with the MaplesFS policies and procedures and in a timely manner;
* developing effective working relations with assigned portfolio of clients and responding promptly and professionally to client requests;
* assessing and advising clients of compliance requirements and obtaining necessary documentation prior to commencing work and in accordance with all internal procedures.



  





*Billing and Receivables* 




  




* ensuring invoices are raised and disseminated to clients in a timely manner and in accordance with administration agreements; and
* consistently monitoring and minimising receivables, ensuring that no balances over 90 days exist without reason agreed to by.



  





*Risk Management* 




  




* acting in accordance with legal, regulatory and internal risk management requirements, including complying with policies and procedures.



  





*Business Development* 




  




* maintaining active contact with a targeted network in order to create market opportunities;
* helping to win new clients to meet the firm’s growth, revenue and cross selling .



  





**What You Bring**






  





 In addition to a commitment to delivering superior candidate and stakeholder experiences:
 



  




* Significant similar experience ideally gained in financial services, audit or any other similar business;
* Strong leadership skills;
* Qualification in accountancy, finance or related course;
* Exercise professional discretion and observing client.



  





**Benefits \& Rewards**




  





 The most enduring professional relationships are reciprocal relationships. The Maples Group prioritises employee health and wellbeing. Depending on your location, we offer a range of benefits, including:
 



  




* Comprehensive health coverage (medical, dental and optical)
* Competitive vacation packages
* Educational assistance and professional development programmes
* Savings or pension plan
* Life insurance
* Travel insurance
* Global mental wellness programme
* Sports clubs and social events



  





 You can learn more about the Maples Group on our corporate website. Experience our culture and our people on our Careers Page or on LinkedIn.
 



 Disclaimer: All personal information collected during the application process will be used for recruitment\-related purposes only. Please refer to our Job Applicant Privacy Notice at maples.com/privacy for details on how we handle personal information relating to job applicants.
 



  





  





 “Please note that it is the Maples Group standard policy to undertake various background screening checks on all applicants to whom a conditional job offer is made. Except for roles based in the Republic of Ireland, the background checks will include criminal records checks when a conditional job offer is made. If you have a criminal record, it does not mean that your job offer will be automatically withdrawn. The Maples Group will make all job offer decisions on a case\-by\-case basis and will take a number of factors into account, such as the role that you are applying for and the nature and circumstances of the past offence. You will have the opportunity to discuss the matter with us before a decision is made. Further details will be provided at the time any conditional job offer is made.”

data.jd_text:
We are seeking an experienced Director of Employee Services to lead and oversee all employee services operations, ensuring accurate, compliant, and efficient delivery of payroll, employee lifecycle administration, onboarding, government services, and benefits administration. The role will ensure HR practices align with UAE labour laws and internal policies while driving service excellence and continuous improvement.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




**1\. Strategy, Policies \& Governance** 



* Translate HR strategy into operational policies, procedures, and controls.
* Oversee payroll governance, compliance, and process optimization.
* Establish and manage medical insurance and employee benefits frameworks.
* Ensure compliance with labour laws, data protection, and confidentiality standards.



  





**2\. Employee Services Operations** 



* Lead end\-to\-end employee lifecycle processes including onboarding, contracts, payroll inputs, leave, attendance, and offboarding.
* Ensure accurate, consistent, and timely service delivery aligned with SLAs.
* Oversee visa, travel, and accommodation services.
* Provide guidance on employment contracts, renewals, and compliance matters.



  





**3\. Payroll Operations** 



* Oversee full payroll cycle ensuring accuracy, timeliness, and compliance.
* Ensure alignment with compensation frameworks, labour laws, and internal policies.
* Manage payroll audits, reconciliations, and reporting.
* Oversee end\-of\-service benefits, pension contributions, and statutory compliance.
* Ensure integration between payroll and finance systems.
* Monitor payroll budgets, costs, and financial planning.



  





**4\. Benefits \& Medical Insurance** 



* Manage employee medical insurance operations and vendor coordination.
* Ensure accurate invoicing, claims handling, and compliance.
* Lead employee awareness initiatives on benefits and coverage.
* Oversee employee engagement and loyalty programs.



  





**5\. Onboarding \& Employee Experience** 



* Ensure seamless onboarding and induction processes.
* Oversee communication with stakeholders for new joiners.



  





**6\. Reporting \& Compliance** 



* Prepare and present analytical reports on payroll, operations, and compliance.
* Maintain audit readiness and ensure accurate documentation.



  





**7\. Stakeholder Management** 



* Build strong relationships with internal stakeholders, government entities, and service providers.



  





**8\. Team Leadership** 



* Lead, develop, and manage the Employee Services team.
* Define KPIs, conduct performance reviews, and support team development.



  





**9\. Employee Data Management** 



* Ensure accuracy, integrity, and audit readiness of employee records and payroll data.



  





**Qualifications \& Experience:**

data.jd_text:
A leading international organisation within the beauty, wellness, and consumer goods sector is seeking an experienced Director of Demand Planning to lead regional forecasting and Sales \& Operations Planning (S\&OP) across a diverse, fast\-moving product portfolio.
 



  





 This is a senior leadership role with end\-to\-end ownership of demand strategy, combining strategic direction with hands\-on oversight. The role partners closely with senior commercial, marketing, finance, product, and supply chain stakeholders to ensure demand plans support growth ambitions while maintaining inventory health and operational agility.
 



  





 As Director of Demand Planning, you will lead demand planning across core ranges, seasonal collections, gifting portfolios, and new product development. You will own the S\&OP agenda, drive cross\-functional alignment, and ensure forecasts are robust, data\-driven, and commercially relevant across multiple channels and markets.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 



  





 • Own and lead the regional demand planning strategy across core, seasonal, gifting, and NPD portfolios
 



 • Drive the end\-to\-end S\&OP process, including pre\-S\&OP and executive alignment forums
 



 • Lead NPD sell\-in forecasting, including launch planning, phase\-in / phase\-out, and cannibalisation analysis
 



 • Partner with senior stakeholders across markets, sales, marketing, finance, product, and supply chain to align demand with commercial objectives
 



 • Develop and continuously improve forecasting methodologies, tools, and planning capabilities
 



 • Monitor forecast accuracy and bias, driving continuous improvement and governance
 



 • Provide leadership, coaching, and direction to regional demand planning teams
 



 • Ensure demand plans are aligned with supply capabilities and inventory targets
 



 Experience \& Background
 



 • 10\+ years’ experience in demand planning, supply chain, or operational planning roles
 



 • Proven leadership experience within FMCG, beauty, wellness, or similarly fast\-paced consumer sectors
 



 • Strong track record leading S\&OP processes at regional or multi\-market level
 



 • Demonstrated experience managing core ranges, seasonal cycles, and NPD concurrently
 



 • Confident operating at senior stakeholder and executive level
 



  





 Skills \& Expertise
 



  





 • Advanced forecasting and statistical modelling capability
 



 • Strong knowledge of S\&OP best practice and cross\-functional governance
 



 • High level of proficiency with ERP and forecasting tools (SAP or similar)
 



 • Advanced Excel and data analytics capability; experience with BI tools preferred
 



 • Strong commercial acumen with the ability to translate data into strategic decisions
 



  





 Personal Attributes
 



  





 • Strategic yet hands\-on leadership style
 



 • Highly analytical with strong problem\-solving skills
 



 • Comfortable operating in a complex, fast\-moving environment
 



 • Collaborative, influential, and outcomes\-focused
 



 • Strong understanding of consumer behaviour and omni\-channel dynamics
 



  





 This is a rare opportunity to step into a senior regional leadership role where demand planning plays a critical role in driving commercial performance and operational excellence.

**About Us**
 With offices in 152 countries and nearly 328,000 professionals, we are one of the world’s leading professional services networks, helping organisations and individuals create lasting value through Assurance, Tax and Advisory services. For over 40 years, we have contributed to the Middle East’s transformation journey, partnering with governments and businesses to deliver sustainable solutions. Today, more than 12,000 of us across Bahrain, Egypt, Iraq, Jordan, Kuwait, Lebanon, Libya, Oman, Palestine, Qatar, Saudi Arabia and the UAE are shaping the region’s future.
   

  

**Line Of Service Overview**
 At PwC Consulting, you’ll shape strategies that redefine industries and drive national visions. We partner with leaders to deliver transformative solutions in enterprise strategy, digital innovation, operational excellence, cyber resilience, and risk management. Join a community that values bold thinking, collaboration, and measurable impact—where your expertise accelerates change and creates lasting value.
   

  

**Business Unit Overview**
 "The Digital \& Cyber Business Unit brings together deep technology expertise and bold thinking to help organizations thrive in a connected, data\-driven world. We support clients in reimagining how they operate, serve, and grow—by harnessing the power of digital products, emerging tech, cloud, data, and cyber resilience.
   

  

 Whether shaping enterprise\-wide transformation or enabling targeted innovation, we work at the intersection of strategy, technology, and trust—delivering scalable solutions that empower clients to move faster, think smarter, and lead with confidence."
   

  

**How You’ll Contribute**
 As a Director in Cyber \& Digital Trust, you’ll work as part of a team of problem solvers, helping to solve complex business issues from strategy to execution. Responsibilities include but are not limited to:
   

  

* Strategic Leadership: Define and lead cybersecurity and digital trust strategies that align with national priorities, regulatory frameworks, and client objectives.
* Executive Engagement: Partner with C\-suite stakeholders to assess digital risks, guide investment decisions, and embed trust into digital transformation initiatives.
* Solution Development: Oversee the design and delivery of innovative, end\-to\-end cybersecurity services, including governance, threat management, data privacy, and digital identity.
* Cross\-Sector Collaboration: Drive collaboration across industries, regulatory bodies, and technology alliances to shape resilient ecosystems and influence policy.
* Thought Leadership \& Growth: Contribute to the firm’s market position through industry leadership, IP developent, and business growth within Cyber \& Digital Trust.


**What You’ll Bring**
* Bachelor’s in Cybersecurity, Information Security, Computer Science, or related field; Master’s preferred. Certifications such as CISSP, CISA, CISM, or equivalent are preferred.
* 12\+ years in cybersecurity, digital trust, or technology risk consulting, ideally in Big Four or top\-tier firms, with a focus on executive leadership and complex cyber program delivery.
* Leads enterprise\-level cybersecurity programs with deep expertise in governance, risk management, and strategic threat mitigation.
* Oversees high\-impact incident response and remediation efforts, including incident response planning, security incident management, and coordinated recovery.
* Provides advanced guidance on security architecture, vulnerability management, and network forensics to strengthen organizational resilience.
* Serves as a trusted advisor to senior stakeholders, translating complex technical risks into clear strategic insights that enable informed decision\-making.


**How You’ll Make a Difference**
 At PwC Midde East, we expect all our people to embody the skills and behaviours of The PwC Professional framework, helping us deliver on our strategy while growing and developing as leaders at every level.
   

  

**Why You’ll Love Working at PwC**
 At PwC Middle East, you’ll find more than just a job \- you’ll build a meaningful career, supported by rewards and benefits that help you thrive. We offer competitive pay, comprehensive benefits, and programs that promote well\-being, balance, and personal growth. You’ll have access to continuous learning, digital upskilling, and a collaborative environment that values innovation, mentorship, and diversity. Are you ready to make a difference? Want to unlock new value by applying your unique perspective and talents? You can grow exponentially here. Discover more about Life at PwC Middle East.

 Role Overview
   

  

 We're seeking an experienced and visionary Chief of Marketing Officer to join our senior leadership team on\-site in Dubai. Reporting directly to the CEO, the CMO will be a strategic partner. You'll have experience driving measurable business growth through OOH Marketing, PR campaigns, e\-commerce platforms, online pharmacy operations and digital channels aligning it with our rapid growth across our UK, Europe, US and Dubai pharmacies and have an ambition to lead in healthcare innovation.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Growth Strategy \& Leadership: Shape and implement a growth strategy aligned with business objectives, leading initiatives across customer acquisition, brand awareness (OOH \& PR), and revenue generation to drive scalable business growth
* Integrated Campaign Management: Oversee the development of multi\-channel campaigns, ensuring consistent messaging and coordination across digital and social platforms
* Partnerships \& Media Relations: Build and maintain relationships with media partners and key stakeholders to amplify brand reach and support PR objectives
* Brand Management \& Positioning: Oversee the brand strategy , ensuring consistent messaging and visual identity across all marketing channels to strengthen market perception


**Requirements**
 Requirements
   

  

* OOH \& PR Expertise: Demonstrated experience planning and executing out\-of\-home and public relations campaigns
* Team Leadership: Proven leadership of global performance marketing within a high\-growth ecommerce or pharmaceutical brand
* E\-Commerce Revenue Growth: Develop and execute a comprehensive e\-commerce growth strategy for online pharmacy platforms such as Shopify. Drive customer acquisition, retention, and lifetime value across digital channels
* Shopify \& Digital Platform Management: Lead the development and optimization of the company's Shopify ecosystem
* Adaptability: Thrives in a fast\-paced, evolving environment and is adept at navigating complex organisational landscapes with agility
* Creative \& Brand Awareness: Strong understanding of brand building, management, and campaign development


**Benefits**
 Why Work With Us?
   

  

 At Medetone, we are committed to creating a dynamic, innovative workplace where every team member has the opportunity to make a real impact. You'll be joining a growing company that's at the forefront of healthcare innovation, with the chance to contribute to exciting projects that are transforming patient care.
   

  

 What We Offer
   

  

* Competitive Executive Salary
* Performance\-Based Bonus Opportunities
* Access to Advanced Operational Tools and Technology
* Opportunities for Professional Growth and Development
* Global marketing ownership and high autonomy


 This is a unique opportunity for a strategic and results\-oriented operations professional to make a significant impact in a fast\-growing healthcare organisation. If you're ready to lead and drive operational excellence, we'd love to hear from you!

data.jd_text:
Role Overview
 



  





 We are seeking a commercially driven and data\-led Chief Digital Marketing Officer (CDMO) with deep experience in the telecommunications sector to lead digital growth, customer acquisition, and transformation across the Group.
 



 The CDMO will play a critical role in scaling digital sales channels, enhancing customer experience, and driving subscriber growth, ARPU, and retention across mobile, broadband, and converged offerings.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 



  





 Digital Growth \& Commercial Strategy
 


* Define and execute a digital\-first growth strategy across mobile, broadband, fibre, and bundled products
* Drive online subscriber acquisition and digital revenue contribution across all markets
* Partner with Commercial, Product, and Technology teams to align pricing, packaging, and go\-to\-market strategies



 Performance Marketing \& Acquisition
 


* Own all digital acquisition channels (paid media, SEO/SEM, affiliates, programmatic, social)
* Optimize customer acquisition cost (CAC) while maximizing lifetime value (LTV)
* Lead data\-driven campaign execution with continuous testing, attribution modelling, and ROI optimisation



 Digital Sales \& Channels
 


* Scale and optimise direct\-to\-consumer digital channels (web, app, e\-commerce platforms)
* Increase digital penetration of sales and self\-service across all product lines
* Drive online conversion improvements through funnel optimisation and UX enhancements



 Customer Lifecycle \& Retention
 


* Lead CRM, lifecycle marketing, and personalization strategies to reduce churn and increase engagement
* Implement targeted campaigns for upsell, cross\-sell, and bundle adoption
* Utilize behavioural data and segmentation to improve retention and ARPU



 Telecom KPI Ownership
 


* Monitor and optimise key telecom metrics including:
* Subscriber growth \& net adds
* ARPU and revenue mix
* Churn and retention rates
* Digital sales penetration
* Conversion rates across digital funnels



 MarTech, Data \& Analytics
 


* Own and evolve the marketing technology stack (CRM, CDP, automation, analytics platforms)
* Build advanced analytics capabilities (customer insights, predictive modelling, segmentation)
* Leverage AI and automation to drive campaign performance and customer experience



 Brand, Content \& Digital Presence
 


* Lead digital brand strategy and execution across all channels
* Oversee content, social media, and digital communications aligned to commercial goals
* Ensure consistent brand positioning across markets and customer touchpoints



 Transformation \& Innovation
 


* Drive digital transformation initiatives across marketing and customer engagement
* Champion agile ways of working and experimentation culture
* Identify new digital revenue streams (VAS, fintech, content partnerships, etc.)



 Leadership \& Stakeholder Management
 


* Build and lead a high\-performing, multi\-market digital marketing team
* Manage external agencies, media partners, and technology vendors
* Collaborate with Technology, Data, and Customer Experience teams to deliver end\-to\-end digital excellence



 Key Requirements
 



 Experience \& Background
 


* Proven experience in a senior digital marketing leadership role within a telecommunications operator or digital telecom ecosystem
* Strong track record in driving digital subscriber growth and online revenue
* Experience managing large\-scale performance marketing budgets with clear ROI accountability



 Telecom Expertise
 


* Deep understanding of telecom products: mobile, broadband, fibre, enterprise solutions, and bundled offerings
* Strong grasp of telecom commercial levers including pricing, promotions, and distribution channels
* Experience working with high\-volume customer bases and subscription models



 Technical \& Digital Skills
 


* Expertise in performance marketing, SEO/SEM, paid media, and programmatic
* Strong knowledge of CRM, marketing automation, and customer data platforms (CDPs)
* Experience in conversion rate optimisation (CRO) and digital funnel management
* Familiarity with telecom digital ecosystems (apps, self\-care portals, e\-commerce journeys)



 Leadership \& Attributes
 


* Highly commercial, data\-driven, and results\-oriented
* Strategic thinker with strong execution capability
* Ability to operate in complex, multi\-market environments
* Strong stakeholder management and executive presence

Maintaining a strong collaborative relationship with hotel senior leadership team and Corporate Office to ensure alignment with Rotana’s commercial vision. In conjunction with the General Manager, the Director of Sales \& Marketing plays a pivotal role in shaping strategic direction, achieving overall business goals, and upholding the brand’s integrity, values, standards, and image within the marketplace.
   

  

 The role will demonstrate a profound understanding of the hospitality industry, market trends, and competitive dynamics, and will lead a high\-performing team of professionals in sales, events sales, and marketing communications to achieve exceptional results and exceed customer expectations.

* Continuous Improvement\-

We are seeking a Director, Sales MEA who is responsible for driving the overall sales performance of the MEA region, with a dual focus on managing a portfolio of strategic accounts and leading a team of sales professionals.
   

  

 This role combines hands\-on ownership of key B2B and B2C relationships with direct people management responsibilities, including the oversight, development, and performance management of the regional sales team. The Director Sales plays a critical role in fostering long\-term partnerships while ensuring the team delivers sustained commercial results, in line with LHW’s global philosophy and policy guidelines.
   

  

 Acting as a key contributor to both execution and strategy, the Director Sales plays a critical role in implementing team\-level sales plans and providing input into the broader regional strategy. The position requires a high level of ownership, cross\-functional collaboration, and the ability to influence stakeholders across levels.
   

  

 Time allocation:
   

  

* 40% leadership
* 30% strategy
* 30% sales involvement


 This is a full\-time position located in Dubai. We offer flexible workplace policies that allow for working remotely 3 days a week and require being in our Dubai office 2 days a week (Wednesdays and Thursdays).
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

 Team Leadership \& People Management
   

  

* Lead, coach, and develop a team of sales professionals, fostering a high\-performance and accountable culture
* Set and manage performance expectations, providing regular feedback and development opportunities
* Serve as a resource and escalation point for team challenges, both internal and client\-related
* Support sales team hiring, onboarding, and succession planning


 Sales Strategy and Execution
   

  

* Drive the execution of sales plans aligned with organizational objectives and member hotel needs
* Contribute to the development of segment, regional, or global strategies by offering market insights and team\-level feedback

 Operations, Reporting, \& Communication

*Taaleem is committed to safeguarding and promoting the welfare of children.  This is a rare and exciting opportunity to join the multi\-award\-winning, Outstanding team at Dubai British School Jumeirah Park, one of Dubai’s leading British international schools, as our
 **Director of Inclusion** 
 .
 



  





 We are recognised as one of the top 10 schools in the world for community, and we are incredibly proud of the culture we have built; one where belonging is real, relationships matter, and every member of our community is valued. Our school is defined by connection, care, and a deep sense of purpose.
 



  





 We are also a proudly, deeply inclusive school, and inclusion here is not an aspiration \- it is our lived reality. As the first school in the UAE to be awarded the Inclusion Quality Mark (IQM), and recognised as Outstanding for Inclusion by both KHDA and BSO, our commitment is both proven and uncompromising. Inclusion at DBSJP is not an initiative or a label; it is embedded in everything we do. Every child is known, valued, and supported to thrive. We do not pay lip service to inclusion \- we live it, every day, in every interaction, for every child.
 



  





 We are seeking an exceptional and visionary
 **Director of Inclusion.** 
 Someone who combines deep expertise with the moral purpose, strategic thinking, and credibility to lead and further develop our outstanding provision. This is a role for a leader who can inspire belief in inclusive practice at every level, challenge thinking where necessary, and ensure that all students, regardless of need, are empowered to succeed and thrive.
 



  





 At DBSJP, innovation, collaboration, and professional ambition define our approach. Guided by our vision of “Enjoy, Aspire, Achieve,” you will lead a highly skilled and committed team within a state\-of\-the\-art, award\-winning school, shaping and driving inclusion at the highest level while contributing to a culture of excellence, wellbeing, and belonging.
 



  





**Requirements** 




 • A relevant degree and Qualified Teacher Status (QTS) (or equivalent).
 



 • Significant leadership experience in inclusion within a high\-performing school, with a demonstrable track record of impact.
 



 • Deep expertise across SEND, EAL, and inclusive practice, with the ability to translate this into outstanding whole\-school provision.
 



 • A values\-driven leader with the credibility and presence to inspire, influence, and challenge at all levels.
 



 • Proven ability to develop, implement, and sustain a whole\-school inclusive strategy that drives exceptional outcomes for all learners.
 



 • Strong leadership and team development skills, with experience in building capacity and empowering others.
 



 • An unwavering belief that all children can succeed, with the right support and high expectations.
 



 • A relentless focus on removing barriers to learning and ensuring equity of access, participation, and achievement.
 



 • Exceptional interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to build trusted relationships with students, staff, and families.
 



 • A reflective, resilient, and solutions\-focused approach, thriving in a fast\-paced, international, and high\-expectation environment.
 



 • Commitment to safeguarding, student wellbeing, and holistic development.
 



 • A willingness to contribute fully to the wider life of the school and ongoing whole\-school improvement.
 



 • A commitment to continuous professional growth and leading high\-quality CPD in inclusive practice.
 



  





**Our school** 




 Dubai British School Jumeirah Park (DBSJP) is a multi\-award\-winning, outstanding British international school, educating over 2100 students aged 3 to 18\. Recognised as Outstanding by both BSO and KHDA, DBSJP is not just a school of exceptional academic results, but a thriving, inclusive community where students are inspired to flourish in every aspect of their lives.
 



 Our students consistently achieve outstanding A\-level results and go on to study at leading universities across the globe, yet the school is equally proud of nurturing each individual’s unique talents, passions, and creativity. DBSJP has been recognised as the Best School in the UAE for Performing Arts and for Staff Wellbeing and was a Best School in the World finalist for Community Collaboration, reflecting a culture that values excellence, care, and connection equally.
 



 We are also the first school in the UAE to achieve Centre of Excellence status with IQM, demonstrating our pioneering commitment to inclusion and innovation. Every initiative, every classroom, every programme is guided by our vision:
 *“Enjoy, Aspire, Achieve”* 
 . At DBSJP, high achievement goes hand\-in\-hand with curiosity, creativity, resilience, and wellbeing, creating a community where students thrive academically, socially, and emotionally \- and are prepared to make a positive impact on the world.

**About The Ned Doha:**
 Housed within Doha’s iconic former Ministry of Interior building, The Ned Doha is not just a hotel — it is a refined luxury destination where heritage, elegance, and contemporary sophistication come together to create an exceptional experience.
   

  

 With seven distinctive dining concepts, 90 beautifully designed bedrooms, elegant event spaces, and Ned’s Club—our private members’ club complete with a rooftop terrace, spa, gym, and a breathtaking 30\-metre outdoor pool—The Ned Doha blends heritage, creativity, and modern luxury into one vibrant experience.
   

  

**The Role:**
 At The Ned Doha, we are more than just a hotel — we are a vibrant destination where culture, hospitality, dining, and creativity come together. We are currently seeking a passionate and visionary Director of Marketing \& Communications to lead the full MarCom function for The Ned Doha. The role is accountable for elevating the brand locally, regionally, and internationally, while delivering strong commercial results across rooms, membership, F\&B, spa, and events.
   

  

 This is an exciting opportunity for a dynamic marketing professional who thrives in a fast\-paced luxury hospitality environment and enjoys building meaningful connections with guests, members, media, and the wider community.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing:**
* Elevating and strengthening the brand positioning of The Ned Doha, ensuring our identity continues to stand out within the luxury lifestyle hospitality scene.
* Driving impactful PR visibility across Qatar, the GCC, the UK, the US, and other key feeder markets through strong media relationships and compelling storytelling.
* Leading the property’s digital ecosystem — including social media, CRM, content, and performance marketing — to engage our audience and grow our community.
* Supporting the continued recognition and success of our award\-worthy dining destinations and our vibrant lifestyle venues.
* Bringing The Ned’s global brand to life locally through cohesive, authentic, and inspiring brand storytelling.
* Championing innovative marketing activations, cultural programming, and meaningful partnerships that connect The Ned Doha with the city’s creative and social scene.


**About You:**
* 10–15 years’ experience in marketing \& communications, with 5\+ years in leadership roles.
* Mandatory luxury hospitality experience.
* GCC experience required; Qatar preferred.
* Strong exposure to lifestyle, membership, F\&B, fashion, or cultural brands.
* Experience working in luxury hospitality, fashion, or art, ideally with exposure in New York or Hong Kong.
* Experience managing multiple agencies and multi‑market PR (GCC, UK, US).


**What’s In It for You?**
* Tax\-free annual salary of QAR 362,400 including housing and transporation.
* 21 calendar days annual leave and 11 paid public holidays
* Sick leave benefits as per Qatar Labour Law
* Private Medical Insurance for self
* End of Service benefits
* Complimentary meals at Neddy’s, our team restaurant (breakfast, lunch \& dinner)
* Exclusive hotel and dining rates for you, your family, and friends
* Outstanding learning, development, and career progression opportunities
* Reward and recognition programmes
* The opportunity to work in one of Doha’s most iconic lifestyle destinations


**Our Culture**
 At The Ned Doha, we go beyond celebrating diversity—we continuously challenge ourselves to be better. Inclusion, respect, and opportunity are at the heart of everything we do, and we are committed to creating a workplace where everyone can thrive.
   

  

**Ready to lead something extraordinary? Apply today and join us as Director of Marketing \& Communications!**
 \#DirectorofMarketing\&Communications \#TheNedDoha

 , ensuring the authentic delivery of Japanese teppanyaki dining experiences while upholding the highest standards of food quality, presentation, hygiene, and safety. data.jd_text:
**Summary**
 The Chief Accountant is responsible for the financial accounting, reporting, and compliance within the hotel, ensuring accuracy, transparency, and adherence to accounting standards and regulations. Reporting to the Director of Finance, the Chief Accountant plays a critical role in managing the hotel’s financial operations, maintaining internal controls, and providing strategic financial insights to support business decisions.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* In conjunction with the Director of Finance, prepare and analyze financial statements in accordance with company's requirements and deadlines, while ensuring accuracy and compliance with accounting principles and regulations.
* Effectively manage and communicate cash flow related issues, including preparation of cash flow statements, management of receivables, payables, cash balances, control mechanisms and deposits.
* Ensure accurate and timely recording of financial transactions, including revenue recognition, expense accruals, and depreciation/amortization schedules.
* Investigate and critique variances to budget or to prior year and offer practical improvement methodologies to management.
* Monitor the capital planning process by assisting management with the calculation of return on capital improvements, gathering support and monitoring the bid process, and ensuring proper upkeep of the property by evaluating scope of work and specifications.
* Provide timely and insightful financial reports to senior management, highlighting key financial metrics, trends, and areas of concern.
* Ensure hotels' compliance on all regulatory licenses and permits, leases, contracts, legal agreements, and the proper execution of all operational taxes.
* Help management in enforcing financial and regulatory compliance.
* Establish and enforce internal controls, policies, and procedures to safeguard hotel assets, ensure compliance with regulatory requirements, and prevent fraud or financial mismanagement.
* Analyze financial data and operations to assist and advise management in maintaining the hotels' financial objectives.
* Ensure that all balance sheet accounts, including bank reconciliations are reconciled on a timely basis.
* In conjunction with the Director of Finance, hire, train, supervise and develop the finance team.
* Ensure the proper utilization, maintenance, and periodic upgrades of all equipment.
* Conduct and/or attend and contribute to periodic meetings to maintain favorable working relationships among employees.
* Coordinate the annual budgeting process and support Director of Finance to collaborate with department heads to develop departmental budgets and financial forecasts.
* Monitor budget performance, analyze variances, and provide recommendations for cost control and operational efficiency improvements.
* Maintain the integrity of the general ledger, overseeing journal entries, account reconciliations, and month\-end/year\-end closing processes.
* Conduct regular audits and reviews of financial operations to assess compliance with accounting standards, internal policies, and legal regulations.
* Coordinate tax planning and compliance activities, ensuring timely and accurate filing of tax returns (e.g., VAT, corporate income tax).
* Establish and continually audit all internal financial controls including purchasing, cash handling, disbursements, inventories, hotel assets, master keys, payroll, and employee records.
* Facilitate external audits, providing audit schedules, supporting documentation, and responding to audit inquiries to facilitate audit completion within deadlines.
* Evaluate and enhance financial systems, accounting processes, and reporting tools to streamline operations, improve efficiency, and support business growth initiatives.
* Implement best practices in financial management and reporting, leveraging technology solutions to automate routine tasks and enhance data accuracy.


 It is not the intent of this Job Description to cover all aspects of the position but to highlight the most important areas of responsibility.
   

  

**KEY COMPETENCIES**
 Alongside with the fundamentals of the brand service culture, the incumbent will be required to demonstrate the below competencies:
   

  

* Business Acumen
* Analysis
* Critical thinking
* Attention to detail
* Integratory
* Compliance
* Planning \& Organisation
* Leadership
* Driving results
* Flexibility
* Accountability


**BACKGROUND**
* Bachelor’s degree in accounting, Finance, or Business Administration.
* CPA, ACCA, or other professional accounting certification.
* Previous experience in hotel accounting.
* Language requirement: professional / native

****Brand Transformation (Primary Focus)****

data.jd_text:
**About QNB**
 Established in 1964 as the country’s first Qatari\-owned commercial bank, QNB Group has steadily grown to become the largest bank in the Middle East and Africa (MEA) region.
   

  

 QNB Group’s presence through its subsidiaries and associate companies extends to more than 31 countries across three continents providing a comprehensive range of advanced products and services. The total number of employees is more than 28,000 serving up to 20 million customers operating through 1,000 locations, with an ATM network of 4,300 machines.
   

  

 QNB has maintained its position as one of the highest rated regional banks from leading credit rating agencies including Standard \& Poor’s (A), Moody’s (Aa3\) and Fitch (A\+). The Bank has also been the recipient of many awards from leading international specialised financial publications.
   

  

 Based on the Group’s consistent strong financial performance and its expanding international presence, QNB currently ranks as the most valuable bank brand in the Middle East and Africa, according to Brand Finance Magazine.
   

  

 QNB Group has an active community support program and sponsors various social, educational and sporting events.
   

  

**Job Purpose Summary**
 The overall role for the position is to assist the SVP/ VP Innovation to drive cultural change around one dedicated strategic innovation themes. The incumbent will manage and monitor all innovation initiatives within his/ her scope in order to ensure that they are implemented and completed within the defined time, budget and requirements with the support of the originally allocated resources. The incumbent will also be responsible for developing, driving and rolling out appropriate tracking metrics for regular reporting to core stakeholders at a project, initiative and program level. He/ she is also responsible for actively maintaining and updating the established ecosystem.
   

  

**Essential Duties \& Responsibilities By Dimensions**
* Shareholder \& Financial:
* Establish and maintain strong working relationships across all business and support units as well as countries across QNB Group
* Assist SVP/ VP in identifying, exploring and validating one or several Strategic themes: AI/ ML, API/ Open banking, Platforms and marketplaces, Robotics and automation
* Own post\-mortems on completed innovation initiatives to ensure that they delivered the forecasted value creation to the Group
* Assist other departments in identifying, analyzing and monitoring external innovation trends
* Manage the roll out of appropriate innovation tracking metrics for regular reporting to core stakeholders at a project, initiative and program level
* Supervise the update of established performance metrics
* Implements KPI’s and best practices for Assistant Vice President Innovation role.
* Promote cost consciousness and efficiency and enhance productivity, to minimise cost, avoid waste, and optimise benefits for the bank.
* Act within the limits of the powers delegated to the incumbent.
* Customer (Internal \& External):
* Support the SVP/ VP Innovation to successfully run the innovation agenda
* Foster and empower employees to create a bottom\-up innovation culture in which participants share ideas to improve existing products/ services
* Act as a partner to the concerned business and support divisions and lead process improvement projects together with representatives from one or more business and support divisions
* Manage activities centered around instilling the innovation culture at QNB, such as innovation days, hackathons, innovation lab, etc.
* Supervise in the preparation of regular updates to the Executive Management on global innovative trends, status of current QNB innovation initiatives and impact of completed innovation projects
* Act as a coach and support for SMEs in the evaluation stage \- Act as a content owner for the Innovation Learning and Development resources accessible to the QNB employee base
* Internal (Processes, Products, Regulatory):
* Obtain mandate, inputs and overall direction from EVP/ SVP/ VP Innovation on specific initiatives
* Supervise the development and preparation of all policies/ processes and procedures as well as standards
* Coordinate the innovation execution by managing the portfolio of group\-wide innovation initiatives and conducting the post\-mortem on completed initiatives
* Be involved and engaged in individual projects on a day\-to\-day basis to provide assistance to the project teams
* Demonstrate advanced project management skills and implement industry best practices and standards of project portfolio management
* Demonstrate deep understanding of Lean and Process Management to ensure alignment with the work undertaken across the wider Innovation Department
* Learning \& Knowledge:
* Identify related areas for professional self\-development
* Possess strong project management fundamentals as well as project portfolio management methodology/ techniques and tools
* Maintain basic knowledge about banking processes, regulations, and generally accepted operating practices.
* Research industry topics and react by recommending changes to products, services, and systems
* Carry out other similar duties that can be defined within the broad functional job and functional responsibilities outlined above
* Proactively identify areas for professional development of self and undertake development activities.
* Seek out opportunities to remain current with all developments in professional field.


**Education \& Experience Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree from Top tier university degree or equivalent
* Minimum of 10 years work experience in a change management and senior advisory function within the financial services arena
* Proven track record within the field of innovation preferably from global financial services institution
* Track record as a change leader, motivator, driver for cultural change throughout a large and complex organization
* Substantial management experience and proven track record in driving senior management agenda
* Demonstrated career development, progress, and experience in establishing new functions
* High level knowledge of all major banking related business and support functions


 Note: you will be required to attach the following:
   

  

* Resume/CV
* Copy of Passport or QID
* Copy of Highest Education Certificate

**Job Summary**
 The data scientist plays a crucial role in driving advanced analytics and AI initiatives across the bank. This role collaborates closely with business and operational leaders to provide expert support, leveraging data analytical and AI tools to deliver strategic insights and actionable recommendations. Through hypothesis\-based analysis to machine learning (ML) projects and applying Large Language Models, the data scientist models complex business problems using a variety of techniques including Predictive or prescriptive analytics, deep learning, GenAI and visualization. Additionally, they support senior leadership by overseeing the development of business insights, reports, and AI capabilities to inform decision\-making processes and drive impactful outcomes.
   

  

 Main Responsibilities
   

  

* Shareholder \& Financial: \- Implement Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) and monitor the performance of Data \& AI\-driven solutions to measure their impact on business outcomes. \- Promote cost consciousness and efficiency in Data Analytics and AI projects to minimize expenses and maximize returns. \- Implement Key Risk Indicators (KRIs) and manage the Group’s exposure to Data \& AI related risk effectively accordingly. \- Coordinate and obtain approval from the EVP Data \& Analytics for projects and new systems that would impact capital or operating expenditures. \- Take part in the overall QNB Data \& Analytics strategy execution. \- Communicate comprehensive and cost\-effective Data, Analytics \& AI solutions to user requirements keeping in mind the Group’s budgets and targets while enhancing productivity, to minimise cost, avoid waste, and optimise benefits for the bank. \- Promote cost consciousness and efficiency and enhance productivity, to minimise cost, avoid waste, and optimise benefits for the bank. \- Act within the limits of the powers delegated to the incumbent.

* Internal (Processes, Products, Regulatory):
* Develop predictive models using a variety of advanced machine learning techniques to extract meaningful insights. \- Research and implement cutting\-edge techniques and tools in data analytics and artificial intelligence to streamline data analysis processes and enhance decision\-making. \- Identify and implement new statistical or mathematical methodologies as required for specific data\-driven projects. \- Build robust data\-driven models to address complex business questions and employ large\-scale experimentation, analysis, and visualization techniques to generate efficient and repeatable insights. \- Integrate domain knowledge into AI solutions, such as leveraging financial risk data, customer journey analytics, quality predictions, and sales and marketing data. \- Continuously monitor the performance and health of AI\-driven models, ensuring high\-quality outputs and efficiency. \- Establish best practices for AI development and production infrastructure, including cloud computing, Spark, GPU utilization, and containerization. \- Design and conduct analytics with the highest standards of model validation, accuracy, encompassing study design, methodology, algorithms, and statistical modelling.
* Learning \& Knowledge: \- Ensure a comprehensive understanding of business requirements to deliver the most effective data, analytics, and AI solutions. \- Possess detailed knowledge of system architecture and limitations to determine optimal problem\-solving methods. \- Understand user requirements and existing data structures to provide appropriate solutions by enhancing existing systems or implementing new ones. \- Stay updated with methodologies, tools, and industry trends in machine learning, artificial intelligence, and data analytics. \- Proactively identify areas for professional development in data science and undertake relevant development activities. \- Seek out opportunities to stay current with advancements in AI and data analytics fields. \- Initiate regular meetings within the Application Development department focused on discussing progress, resolving issues, and addressing concerns related to AI and data analytics projects.
* Legal, Regulatory, and Risk Framework Responsibilities: \- Adhere to all pertinent legal, regulatory, and internal compliance requirements, including but not limited to policies on Data Protection, Fraud Control, and Anti\-Money Laundering (AML) \& Counter\-Terrorist Financing (CTF). \- Understand and effectively perform your role within the Three Lines of Defence framework to identify, measure, monitor, manage, and report risks related to data, analytics, and AI projects. \- Ensure optimal outcomes for clients in line with Conduct Risk policy by leveraging AI and analytics tools ethically and responsibly. \- Support the Risk and Control Self\-Assessment (RCSA), Key Risk Indicators (KRI), incident reporting, and remediation processes, as applicable, in accordance with Operational Risk Management guidelines specific to data and AI initiatives. \- Complete all mandatory training provided by the organization to achieve and maintain the required levels of competence in data science, analytics, and AI fields. \- Attend all required (internal and external) seminars and workshops, as instructed, to stay abreast of the latest advancements and best practices in data analytics and AI.

**Education And Experience Requirements**

data.jd_text:
**The Vision Behind Jadi (جادي)** 
  We believe that a student's potential should not be confined to the classroom until graduation. Jadi is being built to unlock that potential for every university student across Saudi Arabia. We are not just building a job board; we are creating the definitive ecosystem that bridges the gap between academic theory and the professional world.
 



  





 Our mission is to empower students to achieve financial independence so they can support themselves, and most importantly, to connect them with hands\-on, practical opportunities directly related to their fields of study. So they can build real\-world experience and graduate with a robust professional track record, not just a degree.
 



  





 We're looking for the missing piece to the puzzle: a visionary technical partner to lead our architecture and engineer this vision into reality.
 



  





**The Details** 



* **Title** 
 : Co\-Founder \& Chief Technology Officer
* **Location** 
 : Saudi Arabia (Dhahran preferred) \| Remote
* **Commitment** 
 : Full\-time



  





**What You Will Own** 




 You are not joining as an employee; you are taking complete autonomy over the technical direction:
 


1. **Equity** 
 : Negotiable
 **(4\-year vest, 1\-year cliff)** 
 .
2. **Product \& Engineering Leadership** 
 : Shape the technical vision and roadmap.
3. **Core Platform Development** 
 : Build the architecture from the ground up.
4. **Infrastructure \& DevOps** 
 : Ensure scalable, secure, and reliable systems.
5. **Data \& Analytics** 
 : Set up the foundation for data\-driven decisions.
6. **Team Building \& Management** 
 : Recruit and lead a world\-class engineering team.
7. **Regulatory \& Compliance Tech** 
 : Ensure we meet data and local standards.
8. **Partnerships \& Vendor Management** 
 : Own external technical relationships.



  





**The Mindset (Non\-Negotiable)** 



* **Founder mentality** 
 : You treat the platform as if it is yours because it will be.
* **Pragmatic over perfect** 
 : You ship working software fast, then improve it deliberately.
* **Data\-driven** 
 : Every technical decision is tied to a metric that moves the business.
* **Honest \& low\-ego** 
 : You give and receive direct feedback. You say "I don't know" and then find out.



  





**Qualifications** 



* **Education** 
 : BS/MS in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent practical experience.
* **Experience** 
 : Have been through at least one full product lifecycle. 2\+ years of total engineering experience is preferred.
* **Leadership** 
 : Have led or mentored at least a small engineering team or contributed significantly to an open\-source project.
* **Communication** 
 : Bilingual proficiency in English and Arabic.



  





**How to Apply** 




 If you are excited by the mission of empowering students and building a scalable ecosystem, reach us out with:
 


1. A short message (3–5 sentences) on why this problem and this stage.
2. Your GitHub profile or portfolio \- show us code you are proud of.
3. One project story: describe something you built, including the hardest technical decision you made.



  





**Let’s build something incredible!**

 • Contribute to the development of Emarat’s vision, mission, and strategy by providing insights and recommendations that align departmental objectives with Emarat’s short, medium, and long\-term goals to enhance organizational effectiveness and service delivery.
 



 • Assist in the delegation of authority hierarchy and clarify roles and responsibilities within the team to ensure effective management and continuity of operations during personnel changes.
 



 • Serve as a key representative for the organization, effectively communicating departmental performance and strategic initiatives to internal stakeholders and supporting the primary spokesperson in external communications.
 



 • Create and implement innovative strategies to optimize costs and enhance efficiency within the functional department and ensure alignment with the overall department strategy, while promoting digitalization initiatives and fostering a collaborative work environment.
 



 • Support the operational efficiency within Emarat to ensure business continuity and minimize disruptions related to the function that may affect business.
 



 • Conduct periodic reviews of financial policies and procedures to identify improvement opportunities, ensuring best practices are implemented across all finance\-related activities.
 



 • Generate timely and accurate financial reports, including cash flow, receivables aging, and other metrics, to support management decision\-making and departmental requirements.
 



 • Manage Emarat's banking relationship including both national and international.
 



 • Analyze cash flow and sales forecasts in collaboration with department managers to optimize resource utilization and maintain healthy daily cash balances.
 



 • Forecast Emarat’s cash flow position, assess borrowing needs, and recommend actions to mitigate challenges arising from late payments and cash flow issues.
 



 • Drive the corporation’s liquidity strategy, ensuring sufficient funds are available to meet obligations while making informed financing decisions within authority limits.
 



 • Participate in feasibility studies for new projects, evaluating their financial impact on liquidity and profitability to inform strategic decision\-making.
 



 • Arrange and negotiate loan proposals with banks, ensuring the best financing solutions are secured for the corporation’s needs.
 



 • Manage all aspects of financial risk, including liquidity, credit, and operational risks, while developing tools to analyze and report on market risks.
 



 • Review fuel product purchase agreements and other contracts to minimize financial risks, advising on hedging strategies to mitigate interest rate and currency risks.
